Add a HEAVY splash of Pisco Aba.
Garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Pineapple Cooler
directions: In a pitcher, combine all ingredients EXCEPT carbonated water; chill.
Just before serving, stir in carbonated water.
Serve over ice.

name: Homemade Tomato Juice (Without Tomatoes) (Low Fat)
directions: Mix all ingredients well and then put juice in a pitcher with a sealable lid.
Refrigerate.

name: Hibiscus Tea
directions: Remove the stamen from each flower. Use pesticide-free flowers.
Place one hibiscus flower in a glass or mug and cover with boiling water. Allow this to steep. The water will turn a black-purple colour but that's okay. Stir and then remove.
Add sugar to tste and then give it a good stir so that the sugar dissolves.
Now squeeze the juice from some lemon or lime. The tea should turn a pretty pinky-red!
Either drink it hot or set aside to cool and later serve with ice.

name: Cuke Cooler
directions: Note:
Cucumbers should be peeled and sliced.
Lemon and lime are the juice of the lemon or lime.
Process ingredients in a blender until well liquified.
Drink up.

name: Atholl Brose (Spirits)
directions: Put oatmeal into bowl, mix with water to create thick paste.
Let stand for 1/2 hour.
In the next step, the aim is to save the liquid; not the oatmeal.
Strain liquid through fine strainer into bowl.
Press with back of spoon to extract all liquid, throw away oatmeal.
Mix liquid with honey, stir with silver spoon until well-blended.
Pour into quart bottle, fill up with whisky, cork tightly.
Always shake before using.
Serves 4 -.

name: Lemonade
directions: Finely grate rind from 2 lemons.
Combine rind, sugar, water, and salt in saucepan.
Bring to boil and boil 5 minute.
From experience do not leave kitchen until the end of the 5 min.!
Remove from heat and let cool completely.
Squeeze juice from lemons to yield 2 cups.
Stir juice into cooled syrup and store in covered container.
1/4 cup concentrate to 3/4 cup water or soda.
For 1 quart 1 cup concentrate to 3 cups water.
Lemon Iced Tea:.
1/4 cup concentrate to 3/4 cup iced tea.
Pink Lemonade:.
Stir in 1 tbsp grenadine syrup per glass of lemonade.
Garnish with lemon slices.

name: Nick's Famous Lemon Shake Ups
directions: Using a manual juicer, squeeze juice from each half of the lemon into a large container with a secure lid.  Toss in the lemon halves.
Add the crushed ice, water and sugar.
Secure lid and shake well - Pour into a large, tall glass.  Enjoy!

name: Hot Wassail
directions: Combine all ingredients and simmer for 3 hours on low in Crockpot.
Do not boil -- .

name: Bahama Mama
directions: Mix the first 4 ingredients together.
Pour into glass filled with ice.
Add a splash or 2 of Grenadine.
Add fruit garnish.
Enjoy!

name: Coco Quette (Pink)
directions: To a shaker of ice, add rum, fusion, juices, tonic and shake.
Pour into a chilled, sugar-rimmed martini glass.
Sprinkle with coconut flakes and garnish with 2 cherries.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: X-Rated Julep
directions: Mudddle 3-4 mint leaves with 2 teaspoons of sugar.
Combine mint sugar with grapefruit, fusion, vanilla vodka into a shaker of ice and shake.
Strain into a highball filled with crushed ice.
Top with soda and garnish with a mint sprig with straw.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: One Hot Mama
directions: Heat water to almost boiling in microwave (about 3 minutes). Meanwhile empty packet of cocoa in a large mug.
Mix water with cocoa (to make hot chocolate).
Add Baileys, Vodka, Butter shots and splash of cream.  Top with whipped cream if desired.  Enjoy!

name: Klah
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Use two to four teaspoons of mix per cup of boiling water.
Stir well.  The klah should be thick, much like hot cocoa.

name: Mocha Java My Way
directions: In a small saucepan combine coffee, chocolate pieces, and sugar.
Cook and stir over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes or until chocolate is melted and sugar is dissolved.
In another small saucepan heat half-and-half or light cream until steaming, stirring occasionally.
Pour coffee mixture into a mug.
Add warm half-and-half.
If desired, stir in additional sugar to taste.
Makes 1 (12-ounce) serving.

name: Iced Trainwreck
directions: Add the espresso, French vanilla syrup, caramel syrup, English toffee syrup, and half & half to a shaker.
Shake well to blend.
Pour over ice in a 16 ounce glass.
Top with whipped cream and additional caramel syrup, if desired.

name: Midnight Mint
directions: Rim a cocktail (martini) glass with sugar syrup then dip into chocolate flakes or powder.
Add ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake well then strain into the cocktail glass.

name: Cabin Fever
directions: Pour the Bailey's irish cream and creme de menthe into a coffee mug, and stir.
Add hot chocolate, and top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with chocolate shavings and a maraschino cherry if desired, and serve.

name: French Dream Cafe
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice.
Shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass or Rocks glass filled with ice.

name: Irish Ghost
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice and shake for 20 to 30 seconds.
Strain into a cup, with some ice if desired, and serve.

name: Dirty Girl Scout
directions: Combine all ingredients with ice in shaker.
Shake well; strain into glass.

name: Arabian Nights
directions: Brew a top quality chocolate almond flavored coffee.
Let coffee chill if you wish to have this cold.
Place in a coffee glass.
Add Amarula.
Sweeten to taste.
Top with whipped cream and chocolate almond.
Serve at once.

name: The Gto
directions: Grab your favorite highball glass.
Fill glass with fresh, clean ice.
Add Gin and Orange juice.
Fill rest of glass with tonic water (always use small glass bottles to be sure of carbonation).
Squeeze Lime wedge into glass.
ENJOY.

name: Rhode Island Coffee Milk
directions: In a large glass, add coffee syrup and milk.
Stir well.
Taste and add more syrup if you want a stronger coffee taste.

name: Virginia Vapor
directions: Mix the vanilla extract, cream and sugar (if using); then whip.
Beat the egg white until it becomes firm.
Thoroughly blend the vanilla and cream mix with the egg white.
Fill each mug with 1/3 to 1/2 with the mixture.
Add coffee and serve.

name: Midnight Mozart
directions: Brew coffee.
Stir in  liqueur's.
Serve topped with whipped cream.

name: Irish Manhattan
directions: Fill a lowball glass with ice.
Add whiskey and sweet vermouth; stir. Top with giner ale if desired and garnish with maraschino cherry.

name: After Dinner Mint
directions: Combine coffee or espresso and Bailey's Mint Irish Cream.
Add Vodka.
Top with whipped cream and serve.

name: German Chocolate Caketini
directions: Place dark chocolate liqueur, Malibu rum, caramel and splash of Frangelico into a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice and strain into a prepared martini glass about a half-inch from the rim.

Place chocolate syrup and heavy cream into a tumbler. Shake the ingredients and strain on top of the martini using back of spoon placed closely to the ingredients and against the side of the glass. Pour slowly to layer on top. Lightly sprinkle top with toasted coconut.

name: Warm Milk for Sleepness Nights (And Sore Throats Too!)
directions: In a micrrowave-safe cup or bowl mix together the milk, vanilla, nutmeg, sugar and cinnamon (if using).
Microwave on HIGH until the milk is very hot, removing once to stir.
Sprinkle the mini marshmallows on top and enjoy.
Good night!

name: The Mean Fiddler  (Adult Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Pour liquid ingredients together in a blender.
Add ice to the top of the liquid level in the blender, (maybe a handful of cubes).
Blend on high until smooth.
Pour into chilled Martini glasses.
Optional garnish- Pour chocolate syrup in stripes from the center outwards, (like a sunburst).
Use a toothpick to swirl the chocolate and create a pinwheel effect.
Note: If you feel the drink is too thick while blending, add a bit of cream or milk to thin it out.

name: Magic Potion Punch
directions: Stir together chocolate syrup and milk in 4-cup microwavable measure until well blended.
Microwave uncovered on High 3 to 4 minutes or until hot.
Divide heated mixture among 8 paper "hot" cups or mugs.
Slowly pour about 3 ounces (1/3 cup) soda pop into each cup.
Top with whipped topping if desired.

name: Creepy Crawler Ice Ring
directions: Arrange gummy worms in bottom of 5-cup ring mold; fill mold with thirst quencher beverage.
Freeze until solid, 8 hours or overnight.

name: Tiny Lund's Coffee
directions: Bring the water to a rolling boil over high heat in a three-quart saucepan, uncovered, and add the ground coffee and salt. Let it boil for about five minutes.

Turn off the heat and crack in the egg without breaking the yolk (or, break the egg into a small bowl first and carefully pour it in). Cover, and allow to sit, (no additional heat), for about 8-10 minutes.
After the time has elapsed, carefully pour in the ice water -- this helps the grounds to fall out.
Pour the coffee through a sieve into a serving container, allowing the egg and grounds to remain in the pan, and serve right away.

name: Mocha Java With a Kick
directions: If using ice, place ice in a tall glass.
Pour vodka into glass.
Pour Kahlua into the same glass.
Pour coffee drink into the same glass.
Drink.

Don't bother mixing the drink, pouring the liquids in will mix the drink for you (isn't that efficient?).  Do you really want to wash another utensil?  After a few of these, you might not even be able to find it anyway.

name: Lady Bee
directions: Layer the Butterscotch Schnapps first as it is heavier.
Then top with Godiva then Amarula Cream Liqueur.
Tips to layered shot: pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the back of the spoon.

name: Cajun Rattlesnake
directions: Layer into a demitase glass by pouring very gently over the back of a spoon into the glass. Layer Kahlua then Creme de Cacao, then Baileys.

name: Sweet Vanilla Soymilk
directions: Stir the sugar into the hot water till the sugar dissolves.
Add sugar-water and vanilla to soymilk and mix well. Enjoy in black tea, for breakfast and desserts.

similar.name: Vanilla Iced Coffee -- Simple and Easy

name: Tasty Cape Velvet Liqueur
directions: In a large dish, dissolve Nesquick and Nescafe in the hot water.
Add icrecream and beat to soften.
Mix in fresh cream, condensed milk and brandy.
Bottle and refridgerate.

name: Hot  Vegetable Drink (V8)
directions: Put all ingredients in a mug and stir.
Heat in microwave for 1 minute.
Stir and Enjoy!

similar.name: Metabolism Booster/ Hot N Spicy V-8

name: Turkish Coffee - Kahve
directions: Place one espresso size cup of cold water or milk (Depending upon the variety chosen from above) into cazve/very small pot.
Add one teaspoon of powdered Turkish Coffee into the cazve/very small pot.
Add sugar if desired depending which variety you wish to drink.
Stir and heat on stove immediately, coffee will rise, remove from heat and add one spoon of froth into serving cup.

Return pot to heat and cook until coffee rises again.  This could be done once or three times in total each time spoon froth into serving cup.  Once the three repetitions are complete, add the rest of the coffee from the pot into the serving cup.
Good kahve has a creamy foam floating on top. (Similar to the crema found atop good espresso coffee but with a great deal more body).
Do not drink grounds on the bottom of the cup.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Diabetic Iced French Vanilla Whipaccinno
directions: Add enough ice cubes to the water to measure 3/4 cup.
Add to blender container along with the flavored instant coffee; cover.
Blend until slushy.
Pour into glass; top with the whipped topping.

similar.name: Whippersnapper Coffee for the Chocolate Lover

name: Mirage
directions: Mix liqueurs together and serve straight up at room temperature, or.
Serve over ice, or.
Layer for a rainbow effect!

name: Marula
directions: Mix vanilla vodka and Amarula cream together with ice in a martini shaker, strain and pour into a glass; or.
serve over ice.

name: Rasamarula
directions: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a tall glass.

name: Kahlua Kiss
directions: Pour kahlua half-way in a champagne flute filled with crushed ice.
Add creme de noyaux, top with cream, and serve.

name: Pink Squirrel
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Banana Split Shot
directions: Layer in a shot glass in the order above.
Top with Whipped Cream.

name: Alabama Slammer Shooter
directions: Shake over ice,
strain into shot glasses.

name: Iced Cardamom Espresso
directions: You will need an espresso maker.  Before preparing 4 cups of espresso, grind and coat the bottom of the filter with the cardamom.
Add the espresso grounds and begin brewing.
The resulting espresso should be infused with the scent of cardamom.  Add chocolate syrup and  then sugar to taste.
Pour over ice and milk.

similar.name: Peppermint Latte from B H and G Heart Healthy Living

name: My-Chai
directions: In a kettle bring your water to a boil.
Cut off your chunk of ginger, peel it and smash it with a mallet.
Place a tea basket in your tea pot and fill it with all the ingredients except the honey and milk.
Pour the boiling water over the herbal mixture and allow to steep for 3-5 minutes. If you don't want the caffeine omit the black tea leaves but then you will need to let it steep for 5-7 minutes.
In the bottom of each mug put about 1 good table spoon of honey and about a half inch of milk or cream. Stir vigorously to dissolve the honey in the milk.
Pour the tea into the mixture and enjoy!
Additional Notes:
If you do not have a tea pot you can boil your water in a saucepan and drop the herbs into the pan to steep. Pour and strain to serve.
Also, the honey and milk amounts can be adjusted according to your individual taste.
Smashing the ginger helps it to better release its flavor in the tea. This is a great alternative to coffee after a meal and goes great with cakes and cookies.

similar.name: Masala Chai - Homemade, Quick and Easy

name: Cocamocha Rum Cafe  (Regular and Diabetic Directions Given)
directions: Add the milk to a 2 cup glass measuring cup.
Stir in the cocoa.
If using sugar stir that in at this time.
Place in the microwave and heat while stirring every 30 seconds until steaming and beginning to bubble, cocoa should be well incorporated.
Remove from microwave.
Add the hot coffee.
If using Splenda add it now.
Add the run extract and stir to mix well.
Top with whipped cream if desired and serve.

similar.name: Iced Coconut Milk Cafe, Low Fat

name: Chocolate Grasshopper
directions: Mix coffee, ice cream and creme de menth in blender.
Pour in to wine glasses, and garnish.

similar.name: Creme De Menthe Chocolate Vanilla Drink

name: 16 Oz  Coffee Liqueur
directions: Place vanilla bean in your carafe. (coffee pot)
Brew coffee using the dark roast, let cool.
Pour coffee, back into coffee maker and re-brew through the same grounds.
Mix coffee, vodka, sugar and molasses.
Pour into clean bottle, close tightly.
Let sit for two days.
CLEAN out your coffee pot NOW!

name: Chocolate Orgasm
directions: Mix and stir.
Serve.

name: Kahlua Eggnog
directions: Pour over ice.
Serve.

similar.name: Black Russian, Cola Black Russian and White Russian

name: Iced Coconut Milk Cafe, Low Fat
directions: Place 1/4 cup of Recipe#187372 into a glass.
Add 1 cup of skim milk along with coconut extract and Splenda.
Add coffee cubes to fill the glass as full as you want it and give it a stir.
Top with Cool Whip Lite if desired.

name: Pretty in Pink Tini
directions: Shake over ice and serve in a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a cherry.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Coke and Salted Peanuts
directions: Pour the small packet of peanuts into the ice cold coke and drink/chew.
NOTE: This seems no good with a glass of Coke -- it has to be the little bottle.

TIP If you want your cokes SUPER-COLD, stand them straight up in a cooler of ice (up to the necks) and then carefully pour some rock salt around on the ice. Be careful -- too much salt will cause them to freeze solid! Don't get salt on the caps or you'll taste it in the pop. This is an old Carnival sales trick.

name: Tango Mango
directions: Throw it all in a blender and blend to consistency desired.

name: Advocaat
directions: Beat eggs w/sugar & vanilla till light & fluffy.
Put egg mixture in the top of a double boiler & add brandy very slowly, stirring constantly w/a wire whisk till fully incorporated. Remove from heat & allow to cool.
To Serve: Serve in glasses or goblets w/a dollop of whipped cream & a little grated nutmeg on top.

name: Old Fashioned Lemonade
directions: In a small saucepan bring sugar and water to a boil, add peel and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat, bring to room temperature and strain out peel. To a 2 quart pitcher add lemon juice and 1/2 cup of the syrup and 5 cups water stir, taste, adjust ratio of water and syrup. Serve over ice garnished with a mint sprig.

similar.name: Chocolate Soda or Float (Fountain Style & Lightened)

name: Fizzy Frozen Mock-A-Rita
directions: Place 1 (10-ounce bag) frozen strawberries, 1 (6-ounce) can frozen limeade, and 1 (12-ounce) can lemon-lime soda in a blender, process until smooth.

name: Climax Explosion
directions: Build over ice in a pilsner glass,adding all spirits.
Fill with mango juice.
Garnish with green mango wedge or lime slice.
Emjoy! ;).

name: Healthier Kool-Aid
directions: In a large pitcher, combine Kool-Aid and stevia.
Add water; stir and enjoy.

name: Maple Creme Cafe, Diabetic
directions: Pour coffee into cup with cinnamon stick (if using).
Add the maple flavoring, milk and Splenda.
Stir and enjoy.

similar.name: Vanilla Iced Coffee -- Simple and Easy
Cocamocha Rum Cafe  (Regular and Diabetic Directions Given)

name: Standby Frozen Margaritas
directions: Pour the two ingredients into a glass gallon jug (I use an iced tea gallon jug) and stick it in the freezer. Once it gets slushy (about 6 hours) it can be served.

I keep it in the freezer all the time and it never gets rock hard, due to the alcohol content. If it's fairly chunky, just scoop it into non-cooled crystal glasses and it will definitely frost the glass in just a few moments and become drinkable as it warms slightly.

name: Italian Mocha (Bicerin)
directions: Heat the milk to boiling.
Reduce heat and whisk in chocolate and sugar.
Heat mixture to boiling while stirring continuously.
Remove from heat and whisk in coffee and creamer if using skim milk (it thickens the drink a bit).
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Hemingway Special- a Caribbean Inspired Cocktail
directions: Squeeze lime juice into a shaker.
Add remaining ingredients and shake briefly.
Pour into a frosty glass filled with crushed ice.

name: Knockoff Blak
directions: Put the coffee cubes in a tall.
Pour the soda over the coffee cubes, it will foam up so pour slowly.
enjoy.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Milk With Saffron
directions: In a saucepan, combine all ingredients and bring to a boil, stirring constantly to prevent sticking.
Allow milk to boil for 3-5 minutes, or until saffron has dissolved.
Remove from heat.
Allow to cool to warm drinking temperature and serve immediately.

similar.name: Moroccan Cinnamon Coffee With Orange Flower Water
A Nutritional Beverage: Milk Masala With Saffron

name: Louisville Cooler
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine the bourbon, orange juice, lime juice and sugar with a handful of ice and shake vigorously.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice.
Garnish with orange slice and a maraschino cherry and serve.

name: Corpse Reviver (Cocktail Beverage)
directions: Put all ingredients into a sml shaker w/ice.
Shake & then strain into a 3 oz serving glass.

name: 110 in the Shade
directions: Add jalapeno to vodka and steep overnight in a glass container.

When Happy Hour arrives & the sun is bright, pour beer over cracked clear ice into tall pool safe glasses or mugs.  Float an ounce of the pepper infused vodka on top, garnish with a slice of lime and sip through a straw.
Keep life preserver handy just in case.

similar.name: Butter Beer Harry Potter Style (Non Alcoholic)

name: Blue Dragon
directions: Mix vodka and blue curacao with crushed ice, shake or stir, and strain into a martini glass. Garnish with orange slice and cherries.

similar.name: Italian Surfer With a Russian Attitude

name: Absolut Symphony
directions: Shake. Pour into a hurricane glass and add Sprite. Garnish with a strawberry.

similar.name: Italian Surfer With a Russian Attitude

name: Ugandan Ginger Tea Recipe
directions: Combine the milk, tea and sugar in a small saucepan and bring to a boil.
Wash a thumb-sized piece of fresh ginger. Pound until flat - juice should begin to ooze.
Add the ginger to the milk-tea mixture when it begins to boil.
Reduce the heat, letting it all simmer for 2-3 minutes.

name: Peach Melba Daiquiri Slushie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on the highest speed for 45 seconds, or until well blended.
Pour and enjoy!

name: Sangria With Whatever's Around
directions: Choose a red wine - I prefer using a Merlot and if I have an extra dollar I might throw in an equal part Cabernet Sauvignon.  If not, I use the Merlot alone.  Don't spend a lot of money on a vintage wine!  Usually something in the $7-$10 range is just fine.  Put the wine into a container, add the sugar until it's sweet enough to your own taste.  Make sure the container is not filled to the top.

Choose your fruit(s).  Wash, slice and remove seeds.  You do not have to remove skin or rinds unless you want to.  Make slices fairly thin so the wine can permeate the flesh completely.  I prefer using a combination of apples and oranges.  If the purse strings allow, I might even add to that pears, blackberries or raspberries.  The point is -- fruit it up real good.  Don't rule out anything -- pineapples, strawberries -- whatever floats your boat.  Add all the fruit to the container of wine.
Put the lid on your container or cover with plastic wrap and put it in the fridge.  No messing with it!  Let it stay in there at least a day or two.

Serve chilled.  When the Sangria is all gone, you've got the luscious fruit left!  Indulge!  You can also dump it on some ice cream or on some Saralee pound cake -- yum!  Oh and by the way, if you like a fizzy Sangria, add ginger ale or Seven-Up to your glass.
If you don't want a high alcohol concentration, you can water it down with ice cubes.  If you want the whole enchilada, though, add a smidgeon of cognac, rum or Grand Marnier.

name: Bewitched Galliano Recipes
directions: And for the Uncle Arthur, pour 1 shot Galliano into a martini glass, add your standard apple martini (vodka and apple sour liqueur, drop a cinnamon stick in the drink and for all the recipes --
--flirt shamelessly.

name: Golden Dream
directions: Shake with ice serve sprinkled with nutmeg with a cherry!
Flirt shamelessly!

name: Apricot Anis Fizz
directions: Shake in iced cocktail shaker & strain/build.
Fill with ice, soda.
Add lemon twist, apricot slice.

name: Zorro's Revenge
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Cold-Brewed Coffee
directions: Stir together the coffee grounds and water.
Cover and let sit overnight.
Strain through cheesecloth or a fine mesh strainer.  Strain 2-3 times to remove grounds and silt.

This creates a concentrate; to dilute to appropriate proportions, add one part water to one part coffee (i.e., use 1/2 cup coffee concentrate and 1/2 cup water).  Add water or coffee concentrate to adjust to your personal tastes.
For hot coffee, put it in the microwave for 1-2 minutes.
For iced coffee, refrigerate and serve over ice.

name: New York Egg Cream
directions: Pleace a 16-oz. glass in the freezer for 1 hour to chill. Pour half & half into glass; add seltzer water and stir with a long-handled spoon until a thick foam forms.
Pour chocolate syrup into glass an dstir just at the bottom of the glass to incorporate chocolate.

name: Vanilla Iced Coffee -- Simple and Easy
directions: Fill a tall glass 2/3 full of ice.
Add cream, Splenda, and vanilla.
Add coffee and stir well.

similar.name: Creme De Menthe Chocolate Vanilla Drink

name: Tatjana's Sambuca, With Fire!
directions: Pour your sambuca into a shot glass.
Add the 3 coffee beans. Light the sambuka so that it flambe's, and leave lit for a minute or a minute and a half. (not more or the glass will get too hot).
Extinguish the flame by resting a drinking glass on the shot glass so that there is no oxygen and the flame goes out (takes 3 seconds or less)
Wait until the glass has cooled a little to handle and crunch a coffee bean as you drink the sambuca to blend the flavours.

similar.name: Café De Olla: Sweet Cinnamon Coffee

name: Mounds Cafe
directions: Pour coffee into a 10 oz cup.
Add extracts and as much Splenda as you like and stir well.
Add the fat free evaporated milk if desired.

similar.name: Iced Coconut Milk Cafe, Low Fat

name: Black Forest Cocktail
directions: Simply pour the milk over the ice.
Stir in the other two ingredients.
Optional: Top with a dollop of whipped cream or Cool Whip and a drizzle of chocolate sauce; top with a cherry! Yum!

name: Forty Four
directions: Get a large, clean glass jar (with a mouth large enough to fit the orange into) that you can tightly close.
Wash the orange to remove any dirt, dust or wax.
With a sharp tipped paring knife make 44 evenly spaced slits in the orange.
Fully insert a coffee bean into each slit.
Put 44 sugar cubes into the glass jar.
Put the orange into the jar.
Pour all of the Vodka into the jar (yes, I said all of it, no tibbling yet!).
Shake or swirl the jar gently until the sugar is about half dissolved.
Stash the jar in a dark, cool place that your not going into a lot.
Gently (you don't want to bruise the orange) shake or swirl the jar daily for 44 days.

name: Sake On-The-Rocks
directions: Pour the sake over ice.
Add a twist of lemon peel.
I like to run the lemon peel on the rim of the glass.

name: Tomato Beer
directions: Mix the ice cold beverages and enjoy!
A little ice is optional.

name: Pink Passion
directions: Mix alcool, milk and coffee in a mug.
Garnish with whipped cream and a strawberry.

name: Malibu Tropical Dream
directions: Place ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice and add a splash of grenadine. Shake, pour in a glass over ice. Float some grenadine on top.

name: Aquarium
directions: Combine vodka and blue curacao into a shaker with ice.  Shake and strain into martini glasses.
Garnish with lemon or orange twist.

name: Butterballs (Cocktail Drink)
directions: Layer schnapps then kahlua in a shot glass.

name: Chocteer
directions: Mix it all together and serve -- .

name: Pearl Necklace
directions: Mix equal parts tequila rose and bailey's in shot glass, shoot! Also try it chilled.

name: Captain Crunch
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice, shake and strain into a rocks glass.

name: Vella-Roma
directions: Pour into a tall glass over ice.
Fill with bottled still water.
Garnish with lemon slice and enjoy!  :).

name: The Time Warp
directions: Shake midori, malibu rum, pineapple juice and ice then strain into a 5oz cocktail or martini glass.
Add raspberry cordial and blue curacao, garnish with cherry(ies) and serve.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Crush Bus
directions: Blend the strawberries, mint and sugar syrup and pour in shaker.
Add remaining ingredients and shake vigorously.
Pour over ice in an old fashioned glass and enjoy!

name: Fringe Dweller
directions: Blend peach and ginger.
Add remaining ingredients and shake with ice.
Double strain into a cocktail or martini glass.  Enjoy!

name: Pear-Tini
directions: Serve straight-up.
Maraschino cherry garnish.

name: Saké Latté
directions: Comine all ingredients.
Serve on the rocks.

name: Silver Kamikaze
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve straight up.

name: Tropical Waterfall
directions: Pour sake into a pitcher & add 1/2 cucumber.
Infuse sake with sliced cucumber overnight. Mix equal parts of mango juice & cucumber-infused Ruby Saké.
Shake with ice and serve straight up or over ice.
Garnish with cucumber slice.

name: Wasabi Mary
directions: Serve on the rocks.
Stuffed olives and celery garnish.

name: Chocolate Saké Dream
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with chocolate twig.

name: Blushing Bride
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve in martini glass.

name: Silver Greyhound
directions: Pour in a glass of ice and serve with a lime garnish.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: The Happy Sumo
directions: Mix together in a shaker and serve on ice.
Garnish with lemon slice.
Enjoy!

name: Pumpkin Spice Latté
directions: In a sauce pan, combine wet ingredients and heat to desired temperature.
Garnish with whipped cream and cinnamon.

name: Wet Pear
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve straight up.

name: Mock Sangria
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.  Pour gingerale about 3/4 of the way up.  Add red wine to the top of the ice.  Stir.
Drink.  Repeat step#1.

name: Sewer Water
directions: Fill a glass with ice.
Pour liquids, in order listed.
Enjoy!

name: Sparkletini
directions: Pour 2 oz. vodka into a shaker half full of ice.
Stir for 20 seconds and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Top it off with sparkling wine and garnish with a frozen grape.
Enjoy!

name: Vestial Virgin ( Spirits )
directions: In a tall pilsner glass ( 16 oz ) place gin.
Add sloe gin.
Squeeze the juice from slice of lime into the glass, placing lime into glass.
Add ice to fill glass.
Fill with ginger ale.
Do not stir!

name: Give Me a Dime
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with grated chocolate if desired.

name: Road Runner
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Buttered Applejack (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and heat slowly. Do not boil.
When hot, use a ladle to fill four individual heatproof toddy glasses.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick to use a stirrer.

name: Snow Bunny
directions: Pour the Grand Marnier into a heatproof toddy glass.
Add the prepared hot cocoa.
Stir with a cinnamon stick for the full flavor.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Crystal Light Holiday Wassail
The Promised Land for a Chilly Day

name: Chocolate Covered Strawberry (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: In a shaker, mix the the two liquors with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled champagne or martini glass.
Garnish with a real chocolate covered strawberry.
Sit back and enjoy!

name: Chocolate Drink (Pre 1940)
directions: Break chocolate into pieces.
Add hot water.
Cook until smooth.
Add sugar, stirr until dissolved.
Add 1 cup scalded milk.
Flavor with vanilla, (to taste).
Let cook about 5 minutes in a double boiler.
May be served with whipped cream.

similar.name: Nancy Drew's One of a Kind Hot Chocolate

name: Pineapple Orange Eggnog
directions: Combine juices and eggnog in blender, then add ice cream and blend to desired consistency.
Pour into 8 festive mugs and top with orange peel.

name: Beton
directions: Pour all ingredients in a tall glass over ice and stir.
Garnish with a slice of lemon and enjoy!

name: Spiced Pom Blossom
directions: In  glass of ice add liquors and top off with club soda.
Garnish with a slice of lemon.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Vanilla Disatini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker of ice.
Shake well and serve in a martini glass.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Hot Dr. Pepper
directions: Pour the Dr. Pepper into a medium saucepan and heat to about 180-degrees F. (The carbonation will make it look like it's boiling but you can ignore this if you use a thermometer).
Pour the hot Dr. Pepper into a crystal tumbler and drop in the lemon slices.
Enjoy!

name: The Goddess Touch
directions: Muddle cherry, orange slice, sugar and and bitters in a shaker.
Add ice.
Pour in Dewar's scotch whiskey and Disaronno.
Shake vigorously.
Add a splash of 7-Upand strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a cherry.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Green Mountain Skier's Maple Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Bring water to boiling in a small sauce pan.
Remove from heat and add rum and syrup.
Pour into two small cups and put a tsp of butter on top of each; sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Sugarhouse Steamer
directions: Pour maple syrup into bottom of coffee mug.
Add coffee and then pour in milk.
Top with whipped cream drizzled with a bit more maple syrup.
Sprinkle with brown or maple sugar, if desired.

name: Apple Crantini
directions: Combine vodka and cranberry juice in a shaker with ice.
Shake for at least 5 seconds for the flavours to infuse.
Pour into a fancy glass, and enjoy!
(*Of course, you may stir instead of shaking, but it never tastes quite the same).

name: Vermont Maple Mulled Cider
directions: Combine cider, syrup, cinnamon and cloves in a pot and heat thoroughly; DO NOT BOIL!
Remove cloves and cinnamon stick and serve hot, garnished with a half lemon slice.

name: Non-Alcoholic Butterbeer
directions: Carefully mix just before serving, adding the butterscotch flavoring to the soda then stirring gently to mix well, or the fizz will dissipate too soon.
To keep butterbeer on hand, pour 1 cup cream soda out of the 2-liter bottle, quickly add 1 cup butterscotch flavoring, and recap the bottle.Completely sugar-free and alcohol-free!

similar.name: Butter Beer Harry Potter Style (Non Alcoholic)

name: Eggnog Extraordinaire
directions: In a heavy bottomed saucepan combine the milk with cloves, 1 teaspoon vanilla and 1/2 to 3/4 teaspoon cinnamon; bring to a low boil over the lowest setting.
In a large mixing bowl whisk/mix the egg yolks and sugar until no sugar granules remain.
Slowly add the hot milk mixture into the egg/sugar mixture whisking constantly.
Pour the egg mixture back into the saucepan.
Cook over medium heat stirring constantly until thickened (about 3 minutes ---DO NOT ALLOW TO BOIL).
Remove the whole cloves and allow to cool for for about 1-1/2 hours.
Stir in rum, 2 cups whipping cream, 2 cups half and half cream, 2 teaspoons vanilla and nutmeg (adjust the amount of rum vanilla adding in a little more to taste if desired).
Refrigerate for 24 hours before serving.

similar.name: Twelve Treats of Christmas Eggnog Martini

name: John Nott's Wine Chocolate
directions: Put all the ingredients into a heavy saucepan and heat well.
Bring to a boil, beating constantly.
Then serve in 4 cups of mugs, that have been warmed.

name: Coffee Coke Fizz
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender or cocktail shaker and serve in a long glass.

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Easy Sangria
directions: In a 2 quart glass measure, add 1/2 cup wine, brandy, Triple Sec, and sugar. Place in microwave and heat on high for 1 minute or until mixture is warm. Stir, dissolving sugar, and add remaining wine, juices, cloves, allspice, and cinnamon.
Chill for at least 2 hours and strain into a pitcher discarding spices. Stir in sparkling water and remaining ingredients, serve immediately.

name: Homemade Cream De Menthe
directions: Bring water and sugar to a slow boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. (I have used the microwave for this, and it worked fine.).
Allow to cool to room temperature.
If foam forms in the sugar/water mixture, skim off now.
Add food coloring, mint and Everclear or vodka.
Put in pretty bottles.

name: Malted Marshmallow White Chocolate Royale (Paula Deen)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a medium-sized saucepan.
Cook over medium-low heat until chocolate is melted, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and keep warm until time to serve.

name: Frog in a Pond Jelly Shots
directions: Line up shot glasses on a flat tray, this makes moving them easier.
Mix jelly and boiling water in a jug with a spout.
Stir until dissolved.
Add vodka, stir.
Pour into the shot glasses and put in fridge.
On the day of serving, sit a freddo head on each jelly shot and place cocktail umbrella next to him.
The umbrella can be used to loosen the jelly from the sides, then down it like a shot.
Kids can eat it with a spoon, dont want to encourage them to have shots -- .

name: Venetian Coffee
directions: Put the sugar cube(s) in a mug. Add the brandy, then fill with hot coffee.
Top with whipped cream and serve.

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Crock Pot Hot Apple Cider With Mango and Orange
directions: Add the apple cider to a crock pot, add cinnamon sticks, tea bags and brown sugar.
Slice the oranges in slices and add to crock pot.
Turn on high until heated through, 1 hour, depending on your crock pot.
Turn to low and let people serve themselves from the crock pot.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Crystal Light Holiday Wassail

name: The Kerr House Tea
directions: Mix together lemon juice and maple syrup.
Spoon 1-2 tablespoons (to taste) into a mug or tea cup.

Fill with hot water and lightly sprinkle on a pinch of cayenne pepper, to taste. (You can stir it in if you want to). The syrupy mixture can be made ahead and can be stored in a covered glass in the refrigerator for about a week.

Variation: (I've never tried this) Peel lemons, leaving a generous amount of white pulp, which contains bioflavonoids. Cut lemon in half, remove seeds. Mix in a blender with purified water until liquid. Serve according to above directions.

name: Cider Cheer
directions: In a saucepan over medium heat, heat apple cider.
Unwrap caramel candies and divide among the drink mugs.
Stir in the apple cider and top with whipped cream, divided.
Sprinkle cinnamon on top.

name: As Good As Theirs but Lower Calorie Caramel Apple Cider
directions: Add the cider to the simmering water and stir.
Stir in the caramel topping and butter flavoring.
Pour into a big mug and serve.

name: Amaretto Cranberry Kiss
directions: Mix cranberry juice, vodka, amaretto, and orange juice in pitcher.
Cover and chill until ready to serve.
DO AHEAD: Can be prepared 1 day ahead.
Keep refrigerated.
To make 2 drinks, fill cocktail shaker with ice cubes.
Pour in scant 1 cup vodka mixture.
Cover and shake vigorously.
Strain into 2 Martini glasses.
Garnish each with clementine segment.
Garnish with clementine segments.

name: Napoléon's Bane Cocktail
directions: In a cocktail shaker, add all the ingredients, except for the lime slice, and shake for 15 seconds.
Strain the cocktail into a frosted 9-ounce crystal tumbler, then drop in 2 or 3 of the ice cubes.
Garnish with a lime slice.

name: June Bug (Cocktail)
directions: Mix well and pour over ice.  Enjoy!

name: Sparkling Grape Lemonade
directions: Combine grape juice and lemonade. Stir in club soda before serving.

name: Peppermint Twist
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker that is half filled with ice.
Shake well and pour into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Egg Cream (Non-Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Mix ingredients in a chilled tall glass & serve immediately.

name: Taffy Tonic (Non-Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Put molasses into a tall glass. Pour milk into the glass so it's half full.
Add ice cream & stir vigorously w/a spoon.
Fill glass to top w/Club Soda & stir just enough to mix the liquids. Serve w/an iced-tsp & straw.

name: Mind Eraser (Beverage)
directions: Pour Kahlua & Vodka in a glass.
Add ice + 1-2 oz Club Soda (Do not stir).
Drink w/a straw all at once. (That's what the recipe said, but frankly I'd be sipping this baby for sure!).

name: Mock  Nestle' Strawberry Quick
directions: Mix it all up in a glass and drink.

name: Milk and Honey Cold Remedy
directions: Microwave the milk in a mug until piping hot, or about 1 minute 30 seconds.
Stir in the honey completely, so that no honey is left sitting on the bottom and the milk turns a golden color.  I use the measuring spoon to stir the honey in the milk.
Drink hot.

name: The Big Daddy Caddy Margarita
directions: Shake tequila, triple sec, sweet and sour mix, and lime juice with ice. (my hubby does a dance move--it's very humorous).
Take margarita glass or any preferred glass and dip in lime juice to coat rim.
Next dip into kosher salt or margarita salt (I'm pretty sure they are the same) until coated.
Pour cocktail in dropping a few ice cubes to have an "on-the-rocks" feel.
Float Grand Marnier on top.
Add straw and garnish with lime.

name: Pat's Cuba Libre Highball
directions: In a frosted 12-ounce tumbler, pour in the ice cubes. Squeeze the lime wedges over the ice and drop them into the tumbler.
Pour the rum over the ice.
Slowly pour the RC Cola over the ice and stir.

name: Kombucha - No- Alcohol Lime Mint  Bubbly
directions: Put the limes in a shaker (or something large enough with a lid).
Add the agave and muttle. (mash or squish).
Add ice along with 4 or 5 mint leaves.
Add Kombucha (any flavor) to make the shaker 3/4's full.
Top it off  with the sparkling water to the top line of the shaker cup.
Do not strain. Just pour into your glass and Enjoy!

name: Sangria Tuscano
directions: In large pitcher combine red wine, orange juice, and liqueurs, vermouth, lime juice and limoncello and sugar. Stir till well dissolved.
To serve fill wine glasses with ice. Add the sangria and garnish each glass with an orange slice and a cinnamon stick!

name: Canella Merlot
directions: Heat merlot in a large saucepan.
Dissolve sugar in the warm merlot.
Add peels and spices to merlot.  (You can put them in a strainer, but I just dumped everything into the wine.).
Serve warm or cool.

name: Grasshopper Coffee
directions: Divide the 2 liqueurs equally between 2 tall glasses & mix well.
Fill ea glass equally w/the hot coffee & top w/whipped cream.

COOKS TIP #1: The recipe suggested a garnish using the thin "after dinner style" choc mints cut diagonally & inserted into the whipped cream topping. The pic of same is visually stunning, but simple choc shavings will work equally well for me. :-).
COOKS TIP #2: "Use coffee strong enough so as not to taste watery or be too diluted by the liqueurs, but weaker than espresso.".

name: Tip for Improving Harsh-Tasting Coffee
directions: Prepare your coffeemaker with water as usual.
Put the coffee into the filter as usual.
Drip the vanilla extract over the grounds.
Run coffeemaker as usual.
Note -- this will not taste like vanilla coffee. It will only mellow the harshness of the wrong-brand coffee. My DH, who loathes flavored coffees, couldn't taste it at all. ;).

name: Plum Wine Spritzer
directions: Line up 12 white wine glasses, fill with ice.
In each glass, pour 1/4 cup Japanese plum wine, 1/4 cup sparkling water, and 1 T. lime juice.
Garnish with lime slices, serve.

name: Coffee Cognac Cooler
directions: Put 1st 6 ingredients into a shaker & shake well.
Pour equally into 2 tall glasses & gently add a scoop of coffee ice cream to each. Sprinkle w/choc shavings (if using) & serve w/a long-handled spoon.
NOTE FROM ME: I entered this recipe as written, but feel the need to ask a question. Is it just me or is it more than just a little silly to use 2 tsp of sugar in this recipe?.
COOKS NOTE ON RECIPE: "The coffee liqueur can be either cream-based (Kahlua) or non-cream based (Tia Maria).".

name: Hot Mint Julep
directions: Put the bourbon + sugar into 2 warmed lrg wine glasses in equal amts. Add hot coffee equally & stir to dissolve the sugar.
Top w/cream by pouring it over the back of a spoon. DO NOT STIR. Garnish w/chopped mint as desired.
VARIATION NOTE: Can be adapted for use w/other alcohol such as Southern Comfort or Wild Turkey to produce different flavours.

name: Gluhwein (Mulled Wine)
directions: Mix water, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, wine, and the juice of the orange together in a heavy pot.
Bring up the heat, but do not boil.
Add the orange peel and simmer 15 minutes.
Serve immediately in preheated mugs.

similar.name: The Most Amazing Mulled Wine Ever!
Twelve Treats of Christmas Eggnog Martini

name: Craig's Champagne Cocktail
directions: Place the sugar cube in a wide glass ( brandy glass is ideal).
Drip the bitters onto the sugar.
Pour the orange liqueur around the sugar.
Place the slice of orange on top of the sugar.
Gently dribble the champagne over the orange slice so that a clear layer is visible between the liqueur and the wine.
Drink - it gets subtly more lethal as you go down the glass.
The diameter of the glass needs to match the diameter of the orange slice for best layering effect.

name: Nutty Irishman
directions: Add ice to a shaker, pour over ingredients, shake and strain into a martini glass.
Sprinkle with grated chocolate if desired.

name: Angel's Kiss
directions: Add to shaker laden with ice,shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Winter & Spice...how Nice! (Warm Breakfast Drink)
directions: PLACE milk, Carnation Instant Breakfast, ginger and cinnamon in large mug; stir well.

similar.name: Warm Orange Spice Drink for Cold & Flu

name: Dead Green Frog
directions: Mix all liquids.
chill on ice.
strain into shot glasses.

name: Mocha Whip Drink (Alcoholic  or Not)
directions: Fill a tall glass with chipped ice.
Add the chocolate milk and the cold coffee and mix gently.
Top the mocha mix with your favorite whipped cream.
Sprinkle the top with your shaved chocolate and you are ready to serve.
This recipe makes one serving.
For a little bit of a kick, add one ounce of either Kahlua or Bailey's Irish Cream.
Enjoy!

name: Hot Spiced Wine
directions: Combine everything but the wine in a pan and boil for 5 minutes.
Add wine and heat to just before boiling. Try not to let it boil or the alcohol will evaporate.
Strain into cups and serve hot.
Can be garnished with a cinnamon stick.

similar.name: Easy Spiced Wine for the Crock Pot

name: Low-Fat Chocolate Creamer
directions: Mix all ingredients in a small bowl.
Sift ingredients together.
Add to coffe as desired.

name: Pancake Cocktail
directions: Mix the Cinnamon Schnapps and Irish Cream.
Top with whipped cream and lightly dust with cinnamon if desired.

name: Apple Cinnamon Protein Shake
directions: Add ingredients to blender and mix well; add a small amount of water if necessary.

name: Hot Chocolate
directions: In a cup, stir together the milk, drinking chocolate and strawberry milk mix.
Add the chocolate squares, marshmallows and gummy candies to the drink.
Heat in the microwave on medium or medium-low power until the chocolate, marshmallows and candies have melted.

name: Cafe Joy
directions: Combine the Frangelico, Malibu and Baileys in coffee mug or appropriate glass.  Pour in coffee.
Top with whipped cream and toasted coconut.

name: Michler's Collegiate Concoction
directions: Mix 2 cups of margarita mix, 1 cup of tequilla, and 1 1/2 cup of Bacardi ci`clon in a blender with ice.

name: Absolutely the Best Southern Sweet Tea
directions: Hold tea bags lined up evenly by the strings and make a loop knot to hold them together. Pull off paper and staple (from paper side). Set aside.
In a one gallon pitcher, add very hot water. Stir in the sugar till dissolved.
Add tea bags and dunk into water a few times, then leave them in the pitcher. Cover with lid of pitcher and refrigerate.
Wait until it is very cold (at least 3-4 hours). The flavor changes until it reaches the 'cold' state.
Drink and enjoy. (I leave the bags set in the pitcher, but recommend taking them out after about 8 hours---  IF it lasts that long! We make 2 pitchers at a time down here in the south. :).

similar.name: Florence's Fantabulous Crystal Clear Sun or Moon Tea

name: Vyssinatha (Greek N-A Sour Cherry Cordial)
directions: Mix syrup and water together.
Pour over ice in a glass and serve.

similar.name: Warm White Wine With Lime, Vanilla and Port

name: Mmmm Bacon Vodka!
directions: Fry up three strips of bacon.
Add cooked bacon to a clean pint sized mason jar. T.
rim the ends of the bacon if they are too tall to fit in the jar and add optional crushed black peppercorns.
Fill the jar up with vodka. Cap and place in a dark cupboard for at least three weeks.
At the end of the three week resting period, place the bacon vodka in the freezer to solidify the fats.
Strain out the fats through a coffee filter to yield a clear filtered pale yellow bacon vodka.
pour into bottles and enjoy.

name: Linda's Fabulously Easy Ice Cubes
directions: Bring the water to a hard boil for 30 seconds and remove from heat to let cool completely.
Fill ring molds or ice cube trays with the cooled water and freeze overnight. Remove from molds and look at how crystal clear your ice is.
Optionally, add fruit zest or mint leaves as your beverage dictates.

name: Minty Lime Cooler (Or Mojito)
directions: Combine the lime juice, sugar and mint in a blender, and puree until smooth.
Fill 2 tall glasses halfway with ice cubes, then pour half the juice concentrate in each. For the mojito option, add one ounce of rum to each glass.
Top with sparkling water, garnish with lime and mint, and serve.

name: Grateful Dead (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Put ice cubes into a rocks glass.
Add vodka, rum, tequila, Triple Sec and Chambord into a shaker and shake.
Pour over ice in glass.
Top up with cola.

name: Gin Plush Cocktail
directions: Put all ingredients in a cocktail shaker and shake for 15 seconds.
Pour into martini glasses and enjoy!

name: River Run Champagne Cocktail
directions: Divide amaretto and blue curacao between two chamoagne glasses.
Add chilled champagne to each glass and mix.
Serve with an orange twist on each glass.

name: Russian Quaalude (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Add Frangelica to a shot glass.
Add Irish cream gently, then vodka.
Amounts may also be increased and shaken with ice and poured into a larger glass.

similar.name: Italian Surfer With a Russian Attitude

name: Queen of Hearts Cocktail
directions: Combine juices, vodka and campari into cocktail shaker with ice.
Squeeze in lemon juice.
Shake for 15 seconds and serve in martini glasses garnished with a lemon twist.
Enjoy!

name: Love Potion Cocktail
directions: Shake all but strawberries with ice cubes and strain into on-the-rocks glasses with ice.
Stem each strawberry and slice 3/4ths of the way lengthwise from pointed end.  Place over rum of the cocktail glass for garnish.
Enjoy!

name: '57 Chevy - Southern Style
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in a cocktail shaker and shake.
Strain into two cocktail glasses with ice and cover with pineapple juice to fill.  Enjoy!

name: Florence's Fantabulous Crystal Clear Sun or Moon Tea
directions: Early in the morning,put the tea bags in a large glass or plastic pitcher and pour the water over them. (IMPORTANT: DO NOT BOIL THE WATER!Boiling will cloud the tea). Cover the opening of the pitcher with plastic wrap and set the tea out in the sun. Tea will be ready for lunch if it is a hot day or dinner if it's a cool day.
Sweeten with sugar or Splenda to taste, add a lemon wedge and enjoy.
You can also make Moon Tea with this. Just follow the directions and set the pitcher on your counter overnight.  It takes longer but still crystal clear and tasty.

similar.name: Absolutely the Best Southern Sweet Tea

name: Traditional Kuwaiti Tea
directions: Put the tea bags, saffron & cardamon into a pan & add the water. Cover & bring to the boil. (if you do not like your tea strong, you can add the tea bag just after the water has boiled).
Turn off heat then allow to steep for 1-2 minutes.
Pour into cup (use tea strainer!) and add sugar to taste.

similar.name: Afghan Tea - an Authentic Family Recipe

name: Chamomile-Pomegranate Tea
directions: Place tea bags in a large heat-proof measuring cup or pitcher; pour boiling water over tea bags.
Steep 1 hour, or until cooled to room temperature.
Remove and discard tea bags.
Add pomegranate juice and Splenda, stirring until it dissolves.
Serve over ice; garnish with mint sprigs.
Makes 4, 1 cup servings.

similar.name: Florence's Fantabulous Crystal Clear Sun or Moon Tea

name: Afghan Tea - an Authentic Family Recipe
directions: Gently 'bruise' the cardamon by smacking with a rolling to open the husk up a little.
Place the cardamon, milk & tea bags in a pan & slowly simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, mix in sugar & pour into cups to serve.

name: Flavoured Milk Drink
directions: Let the icecream melt.
Mix or stir all the ingredients together until it's clump free in a bowl and pour it into a glass afterwards.
Cover the top of the glass with plastic wrap and let the drink chill for 10 minutes in the refridgerator.

similar.name: Iced Coconut Milk Cafe, Low Fat

name: Spiced Amaretto
directions: Mix amaretto and rum well.
Pour over ice.
Add either soda or cream and stir gently.
Enjoy.

name: St. Patrick's Shnockered! Shandy
directions: Combine seltzer, beer and limeade.
Pour into glasses and garnish with lemon wedges.

name: Creamy Orange Drink
directions: In a small mixing bowl, combine 3 cups orange juice, vanilla and the pudding and whipped topping mixes.
Beat until smooth.
Stir in the remaining orange juice.

name: Southern Comfort Cobbler Cocktail
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in cocktail shaker and mix.  Add bar sugar to taste, if wanted.  Shake again.
Strain into cocktail glass.
Add ice and top off with seltzer.

name: Lime Rickey
directions: Prepare simple syrup by boiling 1 cup sugar and 1 cup water until sugar dissolves.
Cool.
Add lime juice.
Add bitters to taste.
If desired tint a delicate green color.
Pour over ice in tall glasses.
Add corbonated water.
Garnish with thin slices of oranges or a cherry.

name: Ann's Easy Almond Slide
directions: Mix the liqueurs and creamer , stirred or shaken- your choice.
Pour over crushed ice if using.

name: Root Beer Dandy
directions: Combine marshmallow creme and a small amount of milk.
Add root beer and remaining milk until well blended.
Chill.

name: Arnold Palmer (Also Called Half and Half)
directions: Place ice in a tall glass.
Fill half full with lemonade and top with iced tea.
Sweeten to taste.

name: Khlebny Kvas (Kvass)
directions: Slice bread and toast in the oven. Place in a large pan and cover with 4 1/2 qts boiling water.
Cover and leave to soak for 24 hours. Add yeast, sugar and the mint, stir well and leave to ferment in a warm place for 10-12 hours.
Strain everything through a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth. Pour into bottles, add the raisins equally and seal well.
Leave to chill and rest for 4 days then use as soon as possible.

similar.name: Black Russian, Cola Black Russian and White Russian

name: Bloody Bull Fight
directions: In a highball glass, fill half full with ice cubes. Add tomato juice, vodka, beef broth, Chili 'n Lime Sauce and celery salt, stir well until combined.
Add cherry tomatoes to a skewer and place in cocktail for a garnish. Serve immediately.

name: Black Thunder
directions: Mix all the ingredients an serve with snacks.
Lime can be used instead of lemon.
You can experiment with other types of colas or sodas.

similar.name: Masala Chai - Homemade, Quick and Easy

name: Jello Shots
directions: Boil cup of water.
Empty jello powder into a large mixing bowl and add the boiling water.
Continue stirring for two minutes or until the jello is completely dissolved.
Add in the 1/2 cup of cold water and 1/2 cup of vodka.
Stir until mixed and pour into 2oz. cups filled 1/2 to 3/4 of the way.

similar.name: Frog in a Pond Jelly Shots

name: Pomegranate and Pineapple Martini -- Easy to Make
directions: Chill martini glass ( ice or freezer).
Place ice in a martini shaker.
Pour all ingredients over ice ( vodka first).
Shake Shake Shake.
Pour into iced glass.

name: Nane Sharbati (Mint Sherbet)
directions: Pour 3 1/2 tbsp freshly boiled water over the mint and leave to steep for 4 hours.
Strain, mix with the sugar and serve chilled.

name: Nar Sharbati (Pomegranate Sherbet)
directions: Boil 2 cups water and dissolve the sugar in the boiling water. Allow to cool.
Knead the pomegranates til soft. Make a cut in one side and press firmly, catching the juice.
Mix the juice with the sugar water and allow to steep for 4 hours. Serve chilled.

name: Orange Banana Drink
directions: Place all ingredients into blender.
Mix until banana is purified and liquid is combined.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Limon Sharbati (Lemon Sherbet)
directions: Dissolve the saffron powder in 1/2 cup water.
Chop the lemon peel fine and place in a container.
Pour over the peel 2 cups of freshly boiled water and add the coriander seeds. Allow to steep for 4 hours.
Strain and mix in the lemon juice and sugar. Add the saffron infusion and serve the sherbet well cooled.

name: Gisilgul Sharbati (Rose Sherbet)
directions: Pour 2 cups freshly boiled water over the rose petals, add the sugar and leave to steep for 10 hours.
Strain and then add the citric acid, stir and serve chilled.

name: Homemade Oat Milk
directions: (To cook steel cut or thick rolled oats, bring 1 cup of water to a boil in a small sauce pan, add 1/2 cup of oats and turn the heat down to med/low, they just want to gently simmer for about 10 minutes. Give it a stir to check to see if the oats have absorbed all of the water.).
Bring 5 cups of water to a boil.

As you are waiting for the water to boil, add the rest of the ingredients to a blender. As soon as your water is boiling add 3-4 cups to the blender. Be sure that there is room left in the top of the blender and that the lid fits securely or you could risk splashing yourself with hot water when you flip the switch.

Turn your blender on low and increase to high speed, blending for about 20 seconds or so. Check the consistency, add more water as necessary to achieve the desired thickness. The mixture will thicken a little as it cools off and eventually chills.

name: Real Homemade Root Beer
directions: Use the funnel to pour the sugar in the bottle.
Add the yeast.
Toss the sugar and yeast around in the bottle so it mixes well. Just swish it around, don't shake it violently. Make it so there is a little depression in the center of the dry mixture.
Add the root beer extract via the funnel.
Add some of the water by pouring it over the tablespoon so get the extract residue into the bottle.
Fill up the bottle about half way with some more water.
Put the cover on the bottle and GENTLY swish to get the sugar/yeast mixture slightly dissolved.
Add the rest of the water to about 1 to 1-1/2 inches from the top, then cap this TIGHTLY.
Let stand in a cool place (65 to 72 degrees F) for three to four days.
Do not shake the bottle or move it around unnecessarily. Leave it be.
After about 24 hours of brewing itself, the bottle will start to feel hard as the pressure builds.
After three/four days, the bottle should be very hard -- resist the urge to shake it up or open it, you will ruin your root beer.  Place in refrigerator overnight. This arrests the yeast action.
After chilling, decant into a glass and enjoy.
Note: There will be leftover yeast in some sludge at the bottom of the bottle. Be careful decanting as you get to bottom of the bottle. That yeast will be skunky.
Another note:  The yeast is still working! Drink this up right away, keep it chilled.
