directions: Empty contents of frozen Pink Lemonade can into blender.
Fill blender with ice.
Fill Can with vodka and pour over ice.
Blend until ice is crushed to desired size.
Blend in Cool Whip to desired taste.

name: Jaeger Tea
directions: Heat ingredients together in a saucepan until boiling.
Let simmer for 2 minutes, and serve.
Sugar to taste.

name: Hg's Pumpkin-Licious Nog! - Ww Points = 2
ingredients: fat-free sugar-free instant vanilla pudding mix
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend on high until mixed thoroughly.
Refrigerate for a few hours to allow it to thicken. If you like, top each glass off with a sprinkling of cinnamon. Enjoy!

name: Pink Chum-Pagne
directions: Mix the water with the sugar in a jug. Stir until sugar is almost disolved.
Add the orange and pineapple juice. Stir for 5 seconds.
Add cranberry juice.
Fill to brim with lemonade.

name: Starbucks Chantico Copycat
directions: In a saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips.
When melted, pour in the milk and whisk constantly until smooth.
Add whipping cream and vanilla.
Remember: No need to bring it to a boil. Only to steaming hot. At Starbucks, it was served at around 170-180 degrees.

name: Primary Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients and stir well. Keep cold and serve over ice if desired.

name: Caramel Pecan Float
directions: To Toast Pecans:.
Heat an oven to 350°F
Spread pecans in a single layer on a baking sheet with sides.
Bake in the center of the oven 8 to 10 minutes, until fragrant, stirring once. Cool.
Store in an airtight container.
For The Drink:.
Place ice cream in a tall 16-ounce glass.
Spoon toppings over ice cream.
Fill glass with cream soda, stir gently.
Top with whipped cream and pecans.
Serve immediately with straws and a spoon.

name: Peppermint Latte from B H and G Heart Healthy Living
directions: In a medium saucepan, heat and stir the milk until hot but not boiling.
Stir in the creme de menthe syrup or peppermint schnapps.
Whisk to make frothy.
Divide espresso between 2 large cups.
Divide milk between the 2 cups.
If desired, sweeten with sugar or Splenda.
Top individual servings with whipped topping and stir with a peppermint stick.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Hg's Super-Duper Cocoa-Rific Coffee Malt! - Ww = 1 Point

name: Jack Daniel's Lynchburg Lemonade
directions: Simply build over a glass with cubed iceand top up with soda water.
Garnish with lemon.

name: Vinegar Drink for Colds
directions: Stir all the ingredients together in a tall glass until the salt and cayenne dissolve.
Let the drink warm to room temperature, then stir once more and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled again.
Serve cold and sip gradually.

similar.name: Warm Orange Spice Drink for Cold & Flu

name: Flavored Frothed Milk
directions: Crush Flavor Creations tablets and dissolve in 1 tsp hot water.
Add to cold milk and froth with milk frother, moving frother up and down to get the best froth.
Spoon on top of hot chocolate or cappucino

Note: Flavor Creations tablets are distributed by NSI, may be found in the coffee section of the grocery store, and contain no fat, sugar or calories.  They come in a handy tin about the size of a Tic-Tac container, and come in various flavors. I use French Vanilla.

Note: To give as a gift in a hot chocolate gift basket, pour out all the tablets in a ziplock bag, crush them as fine as you can with a rolling pin and then pour back into the tin.  Attach instructions to use 1/8 tsp per 1/3 cup milk.

name: Nancy Drew's One of a Kind Hot Chocolate
directions: Put chocolate, sugar, water, coffee, cinnamon, and salt into a saucepan Stir them together over medium heat and bring the mixture to a boil.
Then lower the heat and cook gently for 4 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and let the mixture cool. Whip the cream with a hand beater or mixer.
When the chocolate  mixture has cooled, stir it into the whipped cream. Put 2 tablespoons of the mixture into each cup.
Fill the cups with hot milk. Stir before serving.
Now enjoy this cup of goodness with your friends!

similar.name: Whippersnapper Coffee for the Chocolate Lover

name: Dark Knight
directions: Put some ice cubes into a cocktail shaker, and add all the other ingredients.
Strain into a chilled martini glass to serve.

name: The Chiapas Chocolate Drink
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Add ingredients up to the whipped cream.
Shake and strain into a highball glass filled with ice.
Top with whipped cream and shaved chocolate.

similar.name: Spanish Hot Chocolate - Chocolate a La Taza

name: Black Manhattan
directions: Fill a mixing glass two-thirds full with ice. Add the rye whiskey (or bourbon), Averna, and both bitters. Stir vigorously for 30 seconds, then strain into a cocktail (martini) glass. Add the cherry.

name: Brownie Cognac
directions: Fill a pint shaker w/ice.
Add cognac, amaretto & chocolate syrup.
Shake & pour into a well-chilled martini glass.

name: Wake  Me up Martini
directions: Measure all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake, strain, and serve.

similar.name: Pomegranate and Pineapple Martini -- Easy to Make

name: Warm Orange Spice Drink for Cold & Flu
directions: In a small saucepan, mix orange juice, water, ginger, cinnamon and clove over medium heat.
Once the mixture is hot, stir in honey until dissolved.
Pour into a mug and enjoy.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Martini
directions: Place ingredients in cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake and serve in a martini glass with a cherry on the bottom.

name: Chrysanthemum
directions: Combine all ingredients, shake and serve over ice.

name: Nj Starfish's Jello Shots
directions: Mix jello into the boiling water and stir until it dissolves.
Add 6 ounces of ice cold ginger ale and stir then add in the vodka.
Pour into pill cups and chill until set.

name: Cherry-Chocolate Coffee Float
directions: In serving glass or mug, place ice cream.
Slowly pour hot espresso over ice cream; drizzle with cherry syrup.
Garnish with whipped cream, cherry and shaved chocolate, if desired.
Serve immediately.

name: Batido De Dulce De Leche
directions: Place ice cream, milk, coffee and dulce de leche in blender.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately with ground cinnamon.

similar.name: Café De Olla: Sweet Cinnamon Coffee

name: Kefir Juice Drink (Like Drinkable Yogurt)
directions: Combine all ingredients and enjoy.

name: Raspberry Flirtini
directions: Place the vodka, chambord and pineapple juice in a cocktail shaker with ice and shake.
Strain into a champagne flute and top with champagne.
Garnish with a raspberry.
Drink up!

name: Suada over Ice
directions: Add espresso and condensed milk to a cocktail shaker, with enough ice to fill it up.
Shake the espresso mixture vigorously to make it frothy and serve.

name: Homemade Almond Milk
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender and blend for 2 minutes.
Strain through a large clean white flour sack towel or a cheese cloth squeezing out the milk into a wide pitcher or bowl.
Keep refrigerated. Lasts 2-4 days.

name: Ww 2 Pt. Root Beer Float
directions: Place half the ice cream in a chilled 16-ounce mug. Pour root beer over ice cream. Scoop remaining ice cream on top.
Serve immediately with a spoon and a straw!

name: Castillian Hot Chocolate
directions: Mix cocoa and sugar together.  In a medium-sized saucepan dissolve  the cornstarch in water and combine with with the cocoa mixture.  Stir until a smooth paste has formed.  Heat this mixture, stirring, while gradually adding in the milk.  Continue stirring and bring to a simmer.  Simmer for 10 minutes while stirring often.  Cocoa is ready when it's thick, glossy and smooth.

name: Mexican Monster  ( Spirits )
directions: In a 12 oz tumbler place sugar, salt ( yes it is needed ) ,mint and lemon juice. Muddle until mixed well.
Place Tequila in glass and mix well.
Add ice to glass.
Fill with water ot tonic and mix well.
Serve!

name: Southern-Ish Style Sweet Tea
directions: Pour 2 quarts of water and your raw sugar to pan - bring to boil.
Add tea bags when water starts to boil.
Cut off the fire, and let steep for about 20 minutes.
Pour 2 quarts of water into gallon pitcher.
Add tea to pitcher.
Quick stir.
Chill in fridge.
Get ready to make some more.

similar.name: Absolutely the Best Southern Sweet Tea
Florence's Fantabulous Crystal Clear Sun or Moon Tea

name: Vegan Chai Mix
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Process mixture in blender or food processor 1 cup at a time.
Store in airtight jars.  If giving as a gift, attach serving instructions.
To serve: put 2 tablespoons in a mug and fill with boiling water.

similar.name: Deluxe Green Tea (Matcha) Hot Chocolate: a Vegan Delight!

name: Jasmine Ginger Sparkler
directions: Combine ginger and tea concentrate while still hot and refrigerate for at least three hours.
Strain and discard ginger.
Pour concentrate and ginger ale into ice filled glasses.
Makes 4 servings.

* For recipes that call for tea concentrates: steep 12 tea bags in 4 cups of boiling water. Before removing, squeeze the tea bags to get all of the liquid. Cool the concentrate in the refrigerator at least 3 hours and keep up to 2 weeks.

name: Lemon Blossom Blaster
directions: In a blender, mix ingredients until fully blended.
Garnish with lemon wedges and fresh mint.

similar.name: Cream Soda Mix for Sodastream Pop

name: Longevity With Honey and Cinnamon
directions: Bring to a boil all the ingredients then simmer to make tea stove top. Do NOT microwave!
Drink 1/4 cup, three to four times a day.
Good Health!

name: Teo's Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients; stir until blended. Add soda just before serving. Serve over ice.

name: Ww Friendly Mint-Infused Darjeeling Tea
directions: Boil the water in a saucepan and add the mint and tea bags.
Remove from the heat, cover, and steep for 3-5 minutes.
Strain into mugs.

name: Annemarie's Monkey La La
directions: Mix all in the blender.
Serve in a cold glass!

name: Peruvian Pisco Sour
directions: Blend pisco with sugar, lemon juice and Angostrua Bitter.
Add ice and finally the egg whites.
Blend a few minutes.
Pour into small glasses and top with few drops of Angostura Bitter.

name: Egg Cappuccino
directions: Bring the milk to a boil.
Whip the egg in a cup.
Pour the boiled milk in the cup with the egg while rapidly stirring.
Serve hot.

name: Cold Cocoa Drink - Healthy!
directions: Scoop a tablespoon of baking cocoa into your cup/mug. (more than a tablespoon for richer taste. remember it's baking cocoa, so it's ok to indulge).
Scoop two tablespoons of sugar into your cup/mug. Skip out on the sugar if you want a diabetic-safe drink.

Add just enough hot water to dissolve the cocoa (and sugar; the 1 1/2 tbsp hot water is an estimate - you'll know if you need more or less). Some coffeemakers dispense hot water. I just use my electric water boiler for this.
Stir well.
Pour in 8 oz soymilk or milk. Stir some more.
Healthy and chocolatey! After the first time mixing, you should be able to figure out how sweet/cocoa-rich you want to make it next time.

similar.name: Deluxe Green Tea (Matcha) Hot Chocolate: a Vegan Delight!

name: Salad in a Glass (Juice)
directions: Juice together all veggies.
Add salt/pepper to taste if you wish.

name: Rainbow Surprise Veggie Juice
directions: Juice all ingredients, stir and serve over ice.

name: Mock Berry Mojitos-Pampered Chef
directions: Combine 2 cups water & the sugar in a microwavable container.  Microwave on HIGH 4-6 minutes until sugar is dissolved.  Stir in mint leaves, let stand 5 minutes.
Combine sorbet remaining water & lime juice in a pitcher.
Carefully pour sugar mixture into pitcher.
Add club soda.
Stir gently.
Pour into ice-filled glasses.  Garnish with lime slices and mint sprigs if desired.

name: Cold Brewed Coffee
directions: Fill a jug with the coffee and water, screw on the lid, and give a good shake.  I use a clean Simply Apple bottle.
Rest at room temperature for about 24 hours, giving a shake every now and then.
Strain the coffee through a filter or a French press and decant into a clean jug or pitcher.
Taste.  If the coffee is too strong, dilute it to your liking.  If it is too weak, add more coffee grounds and let sit out another day.
Store in the refrigerator and use in your favorite coffee recipes.

name: Steamed Milk  by -The-Cup
directions: Pour milk in large mug and microwave for 3 minutes.
Add brown sugar & vanilla. (adjust to taste).
Enjoy and sleep like a baby!

name: Scandinavian Coffee
directions: Add coffee and aquavit to an Irish coffee cup and sweeten to taste.
Gently float cream on top.
Sprinkle with nutmeg, and serve.

similar.name: Moroccan Cinnamon Coffee With Orange Flower Water

name: Limonada
directions: Thinly peel seven 6 inch long strips of lemon peel to make spirals.  Set aside.
Squeeze lemons to measure about 1 cup juice.  Stir together lemon juice, red wine, white wine, and sugar.
Chill the mixture thoroughly.  To serve, pour over ice cubes in glasses, garnish with a lemon sprial.

name: Cricket (Adult)
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Apple, Lemon, Ginger Drink-Sugar Free
directions: Take a knife a gently tear away the skin of the ginger, then grate the ginger or keep it whole or use a combination. Add more to taste.
Remove one cup of Apple juice from the bottle. You need to make room for the lemon juice.
Juice the lemons. You may add more to taste.
Add all the ingrediants into the apple juice bottle.
You can add some agave nector for a sweeter juice.
Let sit overnight.

similar.name: Orange Ginger Tisane or Rum Toddy

name: Real Horchata
directions: Wash white rice and place in a plastic bowl. Add cinnamon sticks and ONLY 1 1/2 cups of the water. Cover bowl and place in refrigerator for about 2 hours.
In a blender, blend the rice/water/cinnamon mix for about 1 minute

On top of a pitcher, strain the rice mixture thru a fine mesh sieve. While the sieve is still on top of the mixture, pour the rest of the the 7 cups of water. Keep in mind that you will not be able to filter out all of the rice thru the sieve, so there will be some remenants of the rice mix at the bottom of the pitcher. This is Ok, just give it a quick swirl before drinking.
Add the 1 cup sugar or more if you would like it sweeter.
Slice the lemon into round circles and add to pitcher.
Swirl drink with spoon before serving or drinking. Serve cold.

name: Tropical Itch
directions: Fill large collins glass with shaved ice.  Squeeze 1/2 lime.  Add dash of angostura bitters, 1/2 oz. bourbon, 1/2 oz. dark Jamaican rum and dash of orange curacao.  Fill glass with Hawaiian passion fruit juice to neck of glass and mix.  Fill with more shaved ice.  Float 1-1/4 oz. Lemon Hart 151 proof rum.  Garnish with 18" straw wedge of pineapple, cherry and back-scratcher with vanda orchid.

name: Kahlua French Cocktail
directions: Add liquid ingredients to a cocktail shaker and shake well.
Pack a double rocks glass with crushed ice.
Pour the cocktail over ice and garnish with lime peel.

similar.name: Black Russian, Cola Black Russian and White Russian

name: Homemade Ginger Ale for a Crowd
directions: Stir together ginger juice and sugar until sugar is dissolved.
For each serving, combine 2 tbsp ginger syrup, 2 tbsp fresh lime juice and 1 1/4 c cold club soda in a 16 ounce glass half-filled with ice. Garnish each glass with a lime wedge.

name: Homemade Ginger Ale - Single Serving
directions: Stir together ginger juice, sugar and lime juice in a 16 oz glass until sugar is dissolved. Fill glass halfway with ice, then fill with club soda. Garnish with lime wedge.

similar.name: Homemade Ginger Ale for a Crowd

name: Jamaican Rum Cocktail
directions: Mix first 4 ingredients over crushed ice in a tall glass.
Top off with 4 ounces of chilled ginger beer.

name: Hato Rey De Limon Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with lime wedge.
This can be made in bulk in a glass pitcher and refrigerated until serving.

name: Almond Cigar
directions: Shake ingredients well and pour into a daiquiri glass, garnish with a stick of cinnamon wrapped with a lime peel.

name: Classic Lemon Drop Martini
directions: Put in a shaker with ice.  Shake, shake, shake and then pour. Dip edge of glass in lemon juice and then dip into fine sugar. Sip, sip, sip! Yum, yum, yum!

similar.name: Pomegranate and Pineapple Martini -- Easy to Make

name: Cheryl's Goombay Smash
directions: Mix all the rums together as your base liquor and put in a seperate container. In a tall glass with ice add 1 to 3 oz of the mixed liquors -- depending on how strong you like it. Add a splash of grenadine and fill the glass with the Dole's juice.Stir with a straw.

name: Cucumber Gimlet (Vodka)
directions: Muddle the cucumber with the sugar in the bottom of a cocktail shaker.  Add in the rest of the ingredients and 1/2 cup of ice.
Shake vigorously for 10 seconds and strain into a birdbath champagne glass or martini glass.
Garnish with a slice (or ribbon) of cucumber or a lime wedge.

name: Cafe Sua Da (Vietnamese Iced Coffee)
directions: Make your coffee.  I use a traditional Vietnamese coffee filter, but you do not have to if you don't have one.
Prepare a cup with about 3 - 4 tablespoons of the sweetened condensed milk.
Stir together coffee and condensed milk.
Pour over ice.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Berry Lemonade Coolers
directions: Add lemonade mix to blender.  Add 3 cups water and berries;  blend until smooth.
Pour into large pitcher.  Stir in remaining water.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: My Very Own Summer Yogurt Cooler (Indian Lassi)

name: Spanish Hot Chocolate - Chocolate a La Taza
directions: Put chocolate & half the milk (500ml) into a pan over a medium heat, stirring until the chocolate has melted.
Dissolve the cornflour in the remaining milk & whisk into the chocolate with the sugar.
Cook on a low heat & whisk for around 5 minutes or until the chocolate has thickened.
Remove from heat & serve into cups.

name: Laylita's Limonada
directions: Place the quartered limes or lemons in the blender with 4 cups of water and sugar.
Blend until the limes or lemon is completely pulverized, the mixture should be slightly foamy with a whitish color.
Strain the lemonade and add the remaining 4 cups of water.
Serve with or without ice based on individual preference.

name: Vera's Grasshopper (Adult)
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and blend until smooth about 2-minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Whippersnapper Coffee for the Chocolate Lover
directions: add all ingredients to your blender or if you have a hand held mini blender use a large cup to hold all liquids.
blend til frothy and pour into your favorite mug.
top with chocolate shavings or cinnamin or favorite topping.
For iced coffee-  used chilled coffee instead of hot.
Add a few crushed ice cubes to the blender and whirl til blended.
If no blender then use a shaker cup- I do this at the cottage , just shake and pour into favorite cups and add toppings.
Additional toppings can be chocolate jimmies, M&M's, whipp cream, vanilla bean shavings.
Use your imagination.

similar.name: Hg's Super-Duper Cocoa-Rific Coffee Malt! - Ww = 1 Point

name: Summer Solstice Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker except grenadine, cherries and orange slices.
Shake and strain drink mixture into a glass over new ice.
Top with a splash of grenadine.
Garnish with 2 cherries and 1 orange slice.

name: Atay Bi Na'na (Mint Tea)
directions: Warm a teapot by swirling a little hot water around the teapot then discarding it.  Put the tea in the teapot, add the mint leaves, and 1-2 tsp sugar per person, according to taste.  Pour in boiling water and stir once only.  Infuse for 5 minutes then serve in your beautiful tea glasses or tea cups and serve at once.

similar.name: Moroccan Cinnamon Coffee With Orange Flower Water

name: Fresh Mint Lemonade
directions: First cut and juice the lemons and put it into a pitcher.
Rinse the mint and rosemary. Then tear apart the mint and rosemary, allowing the flavor to unleash. Put it in the pitcher with or without strainer.
Add the water to the pitcher.
Fill a microwavable cup with the sugar and just enough water to cover the top of the sugar and heat in microwave for 1.5 minutes.
Finally stir the sugar and water until it all dissolves then pour it into the pitcher and add ice if you like. Stir and enjoy!

name: Lil Bit of Sunshine
directions: In the tallest iced tea glass you have, add ice, vodka (pour as generously as your taste suggests) and top off with Mango Sunny D.
Stir and Enjoy!
Any number of garnishes can be added - be creative especially if serving to friends.  :)  (serve an appy if multiple are consumed - I swear they sneak up on ya!).

name: Homemade Vanilla Syrup for Soft Drinks
directions: Mix ingredients and store in a container with a tight-fitting lid.
Shake before each use.
Add to your favorite soft drink to taste.

similar.name: Vanilla Iced Coffee -- Simple and Easy

name: Grandma’s Frozen Boozy Pink Lemonade
directions: Mix liquid ingredients into pitcher
Add enough ice and liquid mixture to blender (do not fill beyond half full) and blend until drink is frothy and smooth.
Continue until all the liquid mixture has been blended
Serve in tall glass with long stemed maraschino cherry as a garnish.

name: Panty Remover #1
directions: Pour gin, vodka, Fresca (whatever amount desired), and a good squeeze of lemon juice into a shaker filled with ice and shake. Pour into a pretty martini glass and enjoy!

name: Bartender's Root Beer
directions: Blend with crushed ice.
Pour into bucket glass, then add coke.

name: Pick-Me-Up Pumpkin Latte
directions: Combine coffee, evaporated milk, pumpkin, Splenda and pumpkin pie spice in 2-cup microwave-safe glass measure or small saucepan.
Heat until very hot (if using stove, use medium-low heat and stir occasionally).
Carefully pour into mugs.
TIP:
To make a foamy top to your latte much like your favorite coffee house creation, prepare as above.
Carefully transfer hot mixture into blender container; cover with lid and then hold down lid with folded towel or potholder.
Blend for 1 minute.

similar.name: Peppermint Latte from B H and G Heart Healthy Living

name: Passionfruit and Guava Bellinis
directions: Pour guava juice evenly between 6 champagne flutes.
Spoon a little pasionfruit pulp into each glass.
Fill flutes with sparkling wine to serve.

name: Brooklyn Egg Cream
directions: Fill glass 2/3 full with a very chocolately chocolate milk. Add seltzer to fill.

name: Roy Rogers
directions: Fill a collins or highball glass with ice.
Add grenadine and fill with cola.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry and an orange slice.

name: Flylady's Cafe Mocha
directions: Mix.
To use, stir 3 heaping teaspoons into a cup of steaming hot water.

name: Lemon Soup--Almost an Aperitif
directions: Place all ingredients in a large bowl and stir to incorporate.
Place about 1/3 of this mixture into a blender.
and whip until it is frothy.
Add all 3 batches back into a the large bowl
and refrigerate for 2 hours.
This may be garnished with lemon zest or mint leaves.

name: Hair of Dragon's Breath
directions: Fill a highball glass halfway with ice.
Put the plain Absolut in first, followed by Peppar.
Fill with vegetable juice (preferably V8 Original. Or be fancy and use one of the many V8 varieties available now or other brands.).
If you like, top with a small shake of original Tabasco sauce.
Garnish with a cilantro leaf and feel the burn.

name: Dreamsicle for Adults
directions: Fill highball glass with ice.
Add vanilla liqueur
Add orange juice.
Add heavy whipping cream (or half-and half).
Stir well and enjoy!

name: Tessa's Homemade Vanilla
directions: Split the vanilla beans lengthwise but leave them intact.
Add vanilla beans to the bottle of Rum or Alcohol.
Put in a cool dark place to steep for six weeks, shaking it every few days.

name: Rich (But Low-Cal) Vegan Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small saucepan.
Heat over medium, watching carefully till it's bubbling. Turn down the heat to low and let it simmer very gently, mostly covered, for 3 minutes or so (say, while you fold that batch of laundry).
Pour into a cup and enjoy.

similar.name: Deluxe Green Tea (Matcha) Hot Chocolate: a Vegan Delight!

name: (Christmas) Cocktail
directions: Cool cocktail glass, gin, Cointreau and wine in the refrigerator for at least one hour before making the cocktail.
Mix gin and Cointreau in the glass.
Fill with wine.
Serve.

name: Homemade Powdered Apple Cider Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, and mix well.
Store in an airtight container until ready to use.
For each serving, place 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon mix in a cup.
Add 1 cup boiling water, and stir well.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Crock Pot Hot Apple Cider With Mango and Orange

name: Kahlua & Eggnog
directions: Add 1.5 oz. Kahlua to a cup of your favorite eggnog (or 3/4 cup of Kahlua per quart of eggnog). Stir. Top with whipped cream and ground nutmeg. Sit back and enjoy!

name: Creamy Pumpkin Hot Chocolate (Vegan)
directions: STOVETOP: Whisk all the ingredients together and heat gently.

MICROWAVE: Put the pumpkin, cocoa powder, and spice in the bottom of the standard size mug first, mix together well. Pour on the vanilla ricemilk on until almost full then mix together, nuke it until hot. (Double recipe if using an extra tall or wide mug.).

name: Easy Spiced Wine for the Crock Pot
directions: Stick cloves into the orange peels making sure to pierce well, place peels in bottom of crock pot.
add wine, sugar and cinnamon.
cover and cook on low 3-4 hours.
place cut oranges out as a garnish for each serving.
tip: add all ingredients to crock and let sit for a few hours to let the flavors blend. cooking time is not reflected in this tip.

similar.name: Warm White Wine With Lime, Vanilla and Port
The Most Amazing Mulled Wine Ever!

name: 4 Seasons Candy Cane Cocktail
directions: Place crushed candy canes on a small plate or saucer. Wet the outside rim of a chilled martini glass with water. Holding the glass by the stem, rotate the rim to coat with candy.
In a cocktail shaker, combine vodka, creme de menthe, cranberry juice, and ice; shake until well combined. Strain into prepared glass; serve immediately.
Garnish with a small candy cane hooked over the edge of the glass.

name: Peach Melba Cocktail
directions: 1/2 fill your tumbler with ice,
add chambord and peach nectar to glass filled with ice, cover glass with boston shaker firmley so secure, shake until condensation appears on outside of shaker.
tap shaker against a solid counter to release glass, pour mix into the tumbler, top up with champage and stir.

name: Halloween Jello Shots (Variety)
directions: Strawberry:  Boil water, add jello and stir until completely dissolved.
Add malibu rum and pour into 2 oz shot glasses (I use plastic) leave some space for gummy worm on top
Chill until jello is 1/2 way set up and add gummy worm.  If you add to early it will fall to bottom, make sure it can support the worm.
Chill until firm and serve!
Pineapple:  Boil water, add jello and stir until completely dissolved.
Add malibu rum and stir.
Follow previous directions to pour and set with gummy worm.
Blue Lagoon:  Boil water, add jello and stir until completely dissolved.
Add sprite and vokda, stir.
Follow previous directions to pour and set with gummy worm.
Raspberry:  Boil water, add jello and stir until completely dissolved.
Add raspberry vodka and stir.
Follow previous directions to pour and set with gummy worm.
Time does not include chill time.

name: Trichy Coffee
directions: In a heat resistant glass add the liquors and microwave until heated thru.
Pour in the hot coffee and stir well. Top with the cream and sprinkle sugar on top. Serve immediately.

name: Cafe Au Vin (Cold)
directions: Place all of the above ingredients into a blender.
Mix at high speed.
Pour into wine glasses.

name: Mocha for One (Or Two)
directions: Fill cup half way with hot coffee.
Add ingredients to coffee in cup and stir to combine.
Add more hot coffee to fill cup.
Stir and enjoy!

name: Jim Howard (Mocktail)
directions: Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour in orange juice; add soda.
Give the mixture a quick stir.
Garnish with an orange slice, and serve.
Note:  You may adjust the proportion to make a smaller drink, if you wish.

name: Toasted Almond
directions: Put ice cubes into a glass (about the size of a regular drinking glass).
Add all liquor and then top off with the mixer.

The creams will (obviously) give you a much richer, creamier drink. DH uses almond milk because he is lactose intolerant, and the taste compliments the amaretto. It can be found in the dairy or baking section of most groceries. Milk is also okay, but it will taste thinner and weaker.
Stir thoroughly to mix ingredients.
Enjoy!

name: Instant Salabat (Ginger Tea)
directions: Peel off the ginger.
Wash and drain.
Cut into small thin strips.
Put one cup of ginger strips in the blender or food processor.
Add one cup of water.
Cover and blend in high speed for 2 minutes.
Strain and squeeze off the juice into a container.
Repeat the procedure using the juice extracted instead of water until all the ginger strips are blended.
Mix extracted ginger juice concentrate and 1 kilo  sugar in a non stick pan.
Put in high heat and reduce the when the mixture starts boiling.
Stir until the mixture becomes very thick.
Reduce heat during this stage and continue stirring until you achieve a moist powdery mixture.
Turn off the heat and continue stirring until the product becomes a little bit cooler and powderized.
Let cool and transfer in a dry sterilized bottle or jar.
For one cup of tea, mix one tablespoon of ginger tea powder in a cup of hot water.

name: Toxic Blue (Adult)
directions: Combine all three ingredients stir and serve over ice.
To make larger batch mix equal amounts of liquor in large pitcher add sprite to individual glasses before serving.

name: Raspberry Beer Cocktail
directions: Stir together first 4 ingredients.  Serve over ice.  Garnish, if desired.
* Fresh raspberries may be substituted.
Notes:
To make ahead, stir together lemonade concentrate and vodka ina large container.  Chill up to 3 days.  Stir in raspberries and beer just before serving.

name: Mojito Slush
directions: In a small bowl, dissolve gelatin and sugar in boiling water; add mint leaves  Cover and steep for 20 minutes.  Press through a sieve; discard mint.  Stir in the limeade concentrate, cold water and soda and rum.
Pour intoa  2 1/2 quart freezer container.  Freeze overnight or until set.
For each serving, scoop 2/3 cup slush into a glass.  Pour more soda into the glass; Stir,  garnish as disired with a mint leaf.

name: Simple Blue Lagoon Margaritas
directions: Using lime slices, moisten the rims of four margarita or cocktail glasses.  SEt aside lime slices for garnish.  Sprinkle coarse sugar on a plate; hold each glass upside down and dip rim into sugar.  Set aside.  Discard remaining sugar on plate.
In a blender, combine the remaining ingredients; cover and process until blended.  Pour into prepared glasses.  Garnish with reservedlime slices.  Serve immediately.

name: Perfect Cup of Greek Tea
directions: Place sage and water in a small saucepan.
heat over low heat until mixture begins to boil.
Using a strainer, pour the tea into 2 glasses, add honey to each and stir well.
Enjoy with a Greek biscuit!

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Moroccan Cinnamon Coffee With Orange Flower Water
directions: Add the cinnamon to the ground coffee beans and brew the coffee according to your coffee maker's directions.
Stir in the orange flower water.
Serve hot with milk and sugar or vanilla sugar if desired.

similar.name: Café De Olla: Sweet Cinnamon Coffee

name: Greek Tempest
directions: Just shake 1 oz brandy, 1⁄2 oz ouzo and a dash of triple sec in a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice.
Strain the drink into a Martini glass and garnish it with a twist of orange peel.

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Monza
directions: Into a tumbler, half filled with ice, pour vodka, crème de cassis and fresh grapefruit juice. Stir.

name: Ww - 5pts Raspberry Mocha Frappe
directions: This first step is optional, but I REALLY don't like the seeds in my drink so I highly recommend this step!  Put the raspberries and almond milk into blender on high until smooth/liquidy.  Then run those through a small sieve to separate the seeds from the mix.  Mix the splenda into the seed free raspberry sauce.

I usually brew mine in my Frappe Machine, but a regular blender will work.  It just won't brew your coffee for you lol.  So once you have rinsed out the blender to clear the seeds from the raspberries go ahead and put in the frozen yogurt, syrup, raspberry sauce and coffee and blend til smooth.
Top with Whip Cream if you want to be extra indulgent but just remember it will change your points a little.

similar.name: Cocamocha Rum Cafe  (Regular and Diabetic Directions Given)

name: Kaffi
directions: A typical Luxembourger will have his after-dinner coffee accompanied by a measure of "Mirabelle" (an Eau-de-Vie made from Yellow plums) or "Quetsch" (another Plum Eau-de-Vie) either in a separate glass, or poured into the coffee.
A 'measure' is equivalent to a 'jigger' which is 1.5 fl. oz.
Enjoy!

name: Red Wine Sangria Recipe
directions: Strain the juices into a half-gallon glass pitcher. Stir in the sugar until the sugar is dissolved. Stir the wine into the juice mixture. Add ice if desired.
Garnish with lemon and orange slices if desired.
It's optional but makes a beautiful presentation and adds more flavor as the citrus slices sit in the drink mixture.
Makes 4 cups.
Recipe courtesy of http://www.cookingnook.com.

name: Lemon N Honey
directions: squeeze 1/2 lemon into coffee mug.
add sugar and honey.
add boiling water to fill, stir.
you can vary the ingredient quantities used to suit your taste.

name: Simple Syrup (Non-Crystallizing Variation)
directions: Put all ingredients into a heavy sauce pan.  Stir.  Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.  Store in a lidded glass syrup bottle or other container.  If bottling while hot, be sure to follow sensible precautions to protect yourself and others from burns, including covering exposed skin and making sure the vessel to which you are moving hot liquid is shatter-proof and tempered.

name: Steamy Tomato Sipper (Slow Cooker)
directions: In slow cooker, stir together tomato juice, lemon juice and brown sugar. Cut celery stalk into quarters and add to juice.
Cover and cook on low until steaming hot, about 4 hours. Pick out and discard celery.
Stir in Worcestershire sauce, horse radish and hot pepper sauce.
Pour into mugs, add 1 oz vodka per serving and garnish with lemon slices and celery.

name: Margarita Sour Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Stir until all the sugar has dissolved.

name: Butter Beer Harry Potter Style (Non Alcoholic)
directions: Unwrap the candy and place it in a saucepan with the water. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Let the mixture simmer until the candy is dissolved; cool.
Pour about 3/4" of the syrup into a glass, add ice to the top and pour in cream soda. Stir well.

name: Sex on the Beach Jello Shot
directions: Bring water to a rolling boil, then remove from heat.
Stir together boiling water and powdered gelatin in a mixing bowl. Stir constantly until gelatin is completely dissolved.
Stir in cold water and alcohol.

Pour mixture into ,individual shot-size (1oz-2oz) plastic or paper cups.  ****To make the Jello easier to consume, buy plastic cups that also have lids. Pour the mix into the cup, add the lid, then turn it upside down prior to refrigeration.
Place shots on a tray in refrigerator (not the freezer). Chill until firm (approximately 2-4 hours). Refrigerate until served.

name: Orange Dream Cocktail
directions: First start by putting a handful of ice in the cocktail shaker to chill the drink while mixing it.
Next add an ounce of vanilla liqueur to the cocktail shaker followed by an ounce of Tang.
Now add one full ounce of vodka, according to taste, to the drink mixture.
Then add one-half an ounce of Triple Sec to the cocktail shaker.
Finally cover the shaker and mix all ingredients well by shaking vigorously.

Pour the drink through a cocktail strainer into a cocktail glass. The glass can be garnished with a slice of orange on the rim of the glass if desired. Remember good drinks always taste better with good friends. Bottoms up!

name: Cranberry Fizz - Prosecco
directions: Fill tall glass with crushed ice.
Pour cranberry juice and procecco over ice.
sprinkle with mint leaves/sprigs.
Serve.

name: Deluxe Green Tea (Matcha) Hot Chocolate: a Vegan Delight!
directions: Whisk the ingredients together and heat gently on the stovetop. Because of matcha's splattery properties, I would not recommend making this in a microwave. Garnish with whipped cream and a little shortbread or biscuit!

name: Lemon Drop Jello Shots
directions: Bring water to a rolling boil, then remove from heat.
Stir together boiling water and powdered gelatin in a mixing bowl. Stir constantly until gelatin is completely dissolved.
Stir in cold water and alcohol.

Pour mixture into ,individual shot-size (1oz-2oz) plastic or paper cups.  ****To make the Jello easier to consume, buy plastic cups that also have lids. Pour the mix into the cup, add the lid, then turn it upside down prior to refrigeration.
Place shots on a tray in refrigerator (not the freezer). Chill until firm (approximately 2-4 hours). Refrigerate until served.

name: Caribbean Blue Jello Shots
directions: Bring water to a rolling boil, then remove from heat.

Stir in cold water and alcohol.

Pour mixture into ,individual shot-size (1oz-2oz) plastic or paper cups.  ****To make the Jello easier to consume, buy plastic cups that also have lids. Pour the mix into the cup, add the lid, then turn it upside down prior to refrigeration.
Place shots on a tray in refrigerator (not the freezer). Chill until firm (approximately 2-4 hours). Refrigerate until served.

name: Easy Cappuccino
directions: put each ingerdient in a food processor.
turn on until everything is mixed into a fine powder.
put 3 tablespoons of mixture into a cup of hot water.
drink.

name: Mocha Cappucino
directions: measure each ingerdient and pour into a food processor.
blend until a fine mixed powder.
store in a sealed jar.
put 2 rounded tablespoons in a cup of hot water, stir briskly, enjoy.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Cosmo Blanco
directions: Fill a vodka shaker full of ice.
Add the liqour and juice and shake well.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with fresh fruit.
Sit and enjoy!

name: El Presidente
directions: Pour rum and vermouth over ice and stir vigorously (do not shake!). Strain into cocktail glass and squeeze orange rind over mixture,.

name: Cafe Sua Da
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice cubes.
In another glass, pour in the sweetened condensed milk. Pour the coffee over the back of a spoon into the same glass, to create a layer effect between the milk and coffee.
Present the Café Sua Da by serving the coffee with condensed milk, the tall glass of ice and a spoon.
Mix well and pour over the ice.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Ginger Beer
directions: Bring the water to a boil and add ginger, sugar and cream of tartar, if using.
Allow to cool to body temperature then add the yeast and raisins.
Place in a container with lid and leave undisturbed for 36 hours.
Strain through sieve or cheesecloth and bottle.

name: Cucumber and Rosemary Spa Water
directions: Put the cucumber and rosemary in a pitcher.
Fill the pitcher with water and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before serving.
Top-off the water in the pitcher as you drink it. Will keep for up to 3 days.

name: Star Daisy Cocktail
directions: Put all ingredients in shaker with ice and shake.  Strain into cocktail glass.

name: Sahlep, Salep, Sahlab
directions: Place all ingredients in a saucepan.
Boil, whisking continuously, for 2 – 3 minutes.
Pour into two cups.
dust with cinnamon.
enjoy.

name: Outback Mai Tai Copycat
directions: Put ingredients in a drink mixer and shake,
Put Huckleberry Syrup into a glass, strain drink mixture into glass, to leave out pineapple pieces.

name: Sugar-Free Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Whisk everything together in a bowl. Sift into a storage container.
To serve, mix 2 level tablespoons with 8 ounces of very hot water or milk. Stir well.

similar.name: Make Your Own Instant Cocoa Mix - Homemade Substitute
Hg's Super-Duper Cocoa-Rific Coffee Malt! - Ww = 1 Point

name: Tropical Strawberry
directions: blend until smooth.
serve while cold.

name: Peppermint Patty Frappés
directions: Process ice cream, milk, and chopped peppermint patties in a blender until smooth.

similar.name: Peppermint Latte from B H and G Heart Healthy Living

name: The 100 Calorie Blended Vanilla Frappuccino
directions: Blend water, milk, and instant coffee thouroughly until combined. (Note: if using real coffee, brew 1/4 cup and 2 tbs. of extra strong coffee and let chill. Then blend with milk until combined.).
Add sugar, ice, and coffee creamer, if using. Blend on medium high until ice is gone.
Pour in a tall glass and enjoy!

similar.name: Peppermint Latte from B H and G Heart Healthy Living

name: Tangerine-Pomegranate Cider
directions: In a large stockpot combine the cider, tangerine juice, pomegranate juice, cinnamon sticks, nutmeg and cloves. Place over medium-high heat and bring to a simmer; simmer gently for 30 minutes.
Remove the cinnamon sticks, ladle into mugs and garnish with tangerine slices. Serve hot.

similar.name: Crock Pot Hot Apple Cider With Mango and Orange

name: Homemade Sweet-And-Sour Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Enjoy!

name: Spiced Tomato Drink
directions: In a large saucepan, combine the first siz ingredients and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes and remove from the heat and stir in lemon juice.
Serve warm or cold.

similar.name: Metabolism Booster/ Hot N Spicy V-8

name: Cool Blue Hawaiian
directions: In blender, combine ice, pineapple juice, blue curaçao, rum, and cream of coconut and blend until mixture is smooth. Pour into 4 glasses. Garnish with pineapple slices and cherries.

name: Wicked Little Leprechaun
directions: Fill a 12 oz high ball (or pint) glass 3/4 full with ice.
Add vodka and blue maui.
Add the splash of lemon-lime soda.
Fill the rest of the glass with orange juice.
Stir to mix.

name: El Chupacabra Cocktail (Cinco De Mayo)
directions: In a shaker filled with ice, add vodka, tequila, sour mix and triple sec. Shake.
Fill an old-fashioned glass with ice (short, wide glass that holds about 6 oz).
Strain the mixture in the shaker over the ice in the glass.
Top with lemon-lime soda.
Dribble a few drops of grenadine around the top of the drink (to give it the look of blood.)
Garnish with 2 cherries on a plastic toothpick dropped into the drink.

name: Independence Day Pink Lemonade
directions: Mix the watermelon vodka (Smirnoff makes one) and lemonade in a pitcher.
Add ice.
Serve in 8 oz highball glasses (the tall, skinny glasses) over ice.

name: Tennessee Mud
directions: Pour into a coffee mug and garnish with whipped cream.

name: Quick & Easy Homemade Almond Milk
directions: In a small saucepan, blanche almonds for about 3 minutes. Drain and let cool on a wire rack or on a tea towel.
When cool enough to handle pop the skins off the nuts, and throw them in the compost.

Pour nut meats and 5 cups of filtered water into a blender and blend on high for about 3-5 minutes. If 5 cups of water seems too much for your blender to handle at once, start with 2 cups of water and then add the remaining 3 cups half way through blending.

Strain the mixture with cheesecloth or a fine sieve over a large jar (or recycled glass juice container). Once should be fine but if you really don't want any almond granules left in there, twice should cover it.
Et voilá! Fresh homemade almond milk. Refrigerate any milk you won't be drinking immediately for up to a week. For creamier milk, use less water. For lighter milk, use more water.

name: Ice Water
directions: Step 1: Take a bottle of water and place on counter.
Step 2: Get a glass, cup, bowl, Yahtzee Shaker, or any other liquid retaining container and place on counter next to the bottle of water.
Step 3: Fill up ice cube tray with water and place in freezer (wait 3 hours) (Note: if you have an ice cube dispenser, skip step 3).
Step 4: Pour water into container.
WARNING: Stand back in case ice explodes.
Step 5: Wait 1 minute.
Step 6: Swirl with spoon.
Step 7: Find a comfortable couch.
All done.

similar.name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf

name: Audrey's Earl Grey Marteani
directions: Instructions.
Moisten the rim of a chilled martini glass with lemon juice and turn it upside down in a saucer of coarse sugar to rim the glass.
Place the lemon juice, simple syrup, infused gin and egg white into a lidded glass or cocktail shaker, add a few cubes of ice and shake vigorously for ten to fifteen seconds.
Strain into the prepared glass and garnish with the lemon twist.
Green Tea-Infused Gin.
One 750 ml bottle of Tanqueray gin (Feel free to substitute your own favorite gin.).
4 tablespoons loose Earl Grey tea leaves.
Carefully measure the tea leaves and feed them through the neck of the gin bottle.
Cap the bottle and shake to mix.
Let the gin sit at room temperature for a minimum of two hours.
Strain the gin to remove the tea leaves, thoroughly rinse the bottle to remove the tea debris and pour the infused gin back into the bottle.
The infusion will last indefinitely if kept refrigerated.
Note: If you are squeamish about consuming raw egg whites, eliminate them from the recipe. They add a nice visual touch, but they do not affect the flavor of the cocktail.

name: Red Date Soup With Dried Longan
directions: Wash and core the red dates.
Separate and flatten the dried longans.
Wash and soak briefly in warm water.
Place the longans and red dates in vacuum flask.
Add 500ml boiling water.
Close the lid tight and let everything steep for about 2-3 hours.
Pour into a small cup to serve.
Remember to bring a spoon so that you can eat the longan flesh and red dates.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Crystal Light Holiday Wassail

name: Blood Tonic
directions: Bring everything to a boil and lower heat to simmer for 1 hour.
Drink it twice a day.

name: Spiced Pineapple Cocktail
directions: Stir together juices, triple sec and tequila in a blender add ice. Blend until smooth and frothy.
On a saucer combine ingredients for the rim of the glass. Wet rim with a lime wedge and dip glass in mix to coat rim.
Pour and enjoy!

name: Cappuccino on Ice
directions: In a medium bowl, combine coffee and milk. Whisk in half-and-half and vanilla until well blended. Pour into glasses filled with ice.

name: Brown Sugar-Caramel Latte
directions: Stir brown sugar into half-and-half until dissolved.
Whip with a milk frother or small whisk.
Pour coffee into a mug, and stir in caramel sauce until dissolved.
Pour frothed half-and-half into coffee, and serve.

directions: Mix juices and pour into tall glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and a maraschino cherrie.

name: Shark Bite
directions: Blend all ingredients together, pour over ice and garnish with lemon wedge.

name: Tipsy Turtle
directions: Mix all ingredients together and pour over ice.  Garnish with a pineapple slice.

directions: Put ice cubes in cocktail shaker.
Combine white cranberry juice and blue raspberry syrup.

name: Patio Perfect Summer Spritzer
directions: Place tea bags in large glass measuring cup. Pour 3 cups (750 mL) boiling water over tea bags. Let stand 4 to 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags. Add 2 cups (500 mL) ice cubes; stir until melted. Chill at least 1 hour.
Pour chilled tea into ice-filled pitcher. Add juice. Serve immediately.

name: Creamsicle Drink Mix
directions: Mix together.
Store in air tight container.
To use, stir 2 tablespoons of Creamsicle Drink Mix into 1 cup of cold water.

name: Aimee's Blue Wave
directions: Simple Syrup:
1 cup Sugar.
1 cup water.

In a small saucepan, combine sugar and water over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat to low, and simmer for 3-5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat, and cool completely. Pour into an airtight container. Store syrup in refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.

Fill a shaker halfway with ice cubes. Add lime-flavored vodka, blue curacao, lime juice and Simple Syrup. Shake mixture vigorously for 5-10 seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with kiwi slices or lime.

name: Frozen Strawberry Lemonade, Two Ways
directions: PLAN A:
Prepare the 16 oz's lemonade according to the package directions.
Place all of the lemonade, and 2 cups of ice in a blender.
Blend until the ice is crushed completely.
Place about two tablespoons of strawberry ice cream topping in the bottom of a glass, and then pour frozen lemonade over the strawberry topping.
Enjoy at once.
PLAN B:
Place lemonade in your 1 1/2 qt ice cream maker and freeze accordingly for 20 minutes.
Place some of the frozen lemonade in the bottom of each glass followed by a good squirt of the strawberry syrup.
Fill glasses with remaining frozen lemonade and enjoy!

name: Rose and Jasmine Tisane
directions: Rinse out the inside of a small tea pot with hot water.
Bring 24 ounces of fresh water to a boil, and pour over rose petals and jasmine blossoms in a tea pot.
Let steep 5-10 minutes, then strain into a pretty china tea cup and enjoy!

name: Coffee -- Greek Frappe -- Caf or Decaf
directions: An immersion blender performs most efficiently.
Combine coffee, sugar, and 3 Tablespoons water in blender carafe.
Whip contents to stiff froth and maximum volume.
Pour froth into tumbler 2/3 full of ice.
Add water and/or milk as desired to fill.
Sip with straw occasionally stirring to combine froth with liquid.
Enjoy.

name: German Chocolate  Cake Cocktail
directions: combine and shake. serve in a glass over ice and garnish with whipped creme if desired.

directions: Pour into a tall glass over ice and stir lightly.

name: Kentucky 95
directions: Combine the bourbon, lemon juice, orange juice and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker with 6 ice cubes. Shake for 10 seconds before straining into a wine glass, topping with champagne and a lemon twist.

name: Vegan Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl. Mix well.
Stir in chocolate chips. Store in an airtight jar or container.
To make:
Add 2-3 tbls.(or more, depending on how chocolaty you want it) of  hot chocolate mix to 1 cup of milk in a pan. Heat, stirring, but do not boil, about 6-7 minutes to melt chips and get nice and hot.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Deluxe Green Tea (Matcha) Hot Chocolate: a Vegan Delight!

name: Wild Thanksgiving Cocktail
directions: Muddle mint leaves in bottom of glass.
shake everything else together and pour into glass.
serve chilled.

directions: Combine sugar, water & spices.  Bring to a boil & simmer until sugar is dissolved,  Set aside.
Combine wine, port & brandy in large crock pot.  Add simple syrup with the spices.  Stir.
Heat on high until hot then switch to low.
ENJOY.

name: Black Cherry Coke-Nut Jello Shooters
directions: Combine Jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold liquor and coke, mixing well.
Pour into 2 oz. condiment cups; chill until firm.

name: Twelve Treats of Christmas Eggnog Martini
directions: If desired, dip the rim of a chilled martini glass in honey and then into graham cracker crumbs.
Pour rums, vodka, and eggnog in a shaker with ice. Shake until combined.
Strain into glass, sprinkle with nutmeg, and garnish with a cinnamon stick, if desired. Makes one stiff eggnog martini.

similar.name: The Most Amazing Mulled Wine Ever!

name: Sparkling Adult Cider
directions: Pour 1/2 cup cider each into two wine glasses.
Fill the rest with spumante and repeat as necessary.

name: Natural Lemonade
directions: Mix lemon juice, agave nectar, and water together.
Add ice cubes and add lemon juice or agave nectar to taste.
Enjoy!

name: Yoo Hoo / Yoohoo Mix-Ups
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.Blend.
Chill in refrigerator.
Enjoy!

name: Cream Soda Mix for Sodastream Pop
directions: In a medium pan, heat the Turbinado sugar and 1/4 cup water over medium high heat until carmelized.
Cut and squeeze one lemon.
Split the vanilla bean or use the vanilla extract.
Remove pan from stove and add 2 cups water and the lemon juice. Add vanilla bean and seeds, return pan to the heat and bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and allow to stand for 1 hour.
Pour syrup into an airtight container.  Store in the refrigerator.
Add syrup to taste to carbonated water.

similar.name: Chocolate Soda or Float (Fountain Style & Lightened)

name: Dark Night
directions: Preparation of fill - 3 months in advance
Over an open pan saute cashew - till they are slightly burnt.
You can use microwave as well.
Wait till they are at room temperature.
Fill 1/3 of an airtight container with cashew (above prepared).
Pour in honey and close the container.
Refrigerate if need be
Keep it safe for 3 months or more.
Now you are ready to with the flavored cashew.
In a wide mouth glass, take 1/4 of the mix.
Use little of carbonated water to untangle the mix.
Add your poison (Scotch Whiskey) 60 ml.
Stir a little.
Fill your glass with carbonated water
Cheers! to the Dark Burnt Taste.

name: Blackberry-Grape Tea
directions: Comine the grape juice, cinnamon stick, and allspice in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally. Pour the tea into the saucepan and stir all the ingredients together. Remove the cinnamon stick and strain the tea into a large mug.

name: Cinnamon Tea Punch
directions: Combine the juice, nectar, and cinnamon sticks in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the tea and stir to mix all the ingredients together. Remove the sticks and pour the mixture into 4 mugs and sprinkle with ground cinnamon , if desired.

name: Black Currant-Apple Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea and apple juice together and pour over ice in a tall glass. Garnish with apple or orange slices, depending on your taste.

name: Sugar-Free Frappuccino (Ww-1 Point Plus)
directions: Put brewed coffee, milk, and syrup in the blender along with enough ice to make it thick. Blend until ice is combined with the liquid. This should make at least a Grande Starbucks size drink depending upon the amount of ice and coffee used.

name: Cremsicle
directions: Add ice to cocktail shaker.  Add vodka, orange juice, and half & half to shaker and shake until incorporated.
Serve over ice and enjoy!

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Milkshake
directions: Combine peanut butter, ice cream, chocolate syrup and milk in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Serve with a dollop of whipped cream and top with chopped nuts and maraschino cherry if desired.

name: Apple Pie Schnapps-Adult Beverage
directions: Bring all ingredients EXCEPT EVERCLEAR to a soft boil.  Simmer for 30-45 minutes.
Let cool and stir in Everclear. If you prefer a clear liquid, strain the mixture before adding the Everclear.
I store the majority of it in the juice bottles that it came inches  For gifts, I either pour into a mason jar with a fresh cinnamon stick or pretty glass bottle with a cork or stopper.
Store in the fridge, serve hot, like regular cider or iced.  Also great for mixing into other cocktails.
I serve this with Arroz con Leche on cold nights for dessert.

name: Basic Punch

Before serving add ginger ale.
(I freeze a portion of the mixed juice, kool-aid, water and sugar in a container or jello mold and use it instead of ice).

name: Border Buttermilk
directions: Place contents of can into regular size blender, add tequila (2/3 of a can), pack with ice cubes.
Blend on high, gently rocking mixer to move ice to bottom.
Blend at least 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until color has lightened to a lighter pink.
Rim frozen margarita or martini glasses with cocktail sugar.
Pour and serve.
You can make a couple pitchers ahead of time and put them in the freezer quickly, and just re-blend when the party starts.

name: Cucumber Cooler
directions: Place the cucumber slices in the bottom of a pitcher.
Fill a pitcher with water (about a quart.).
Add the mint springs-- I use 2, but feel free to add more if you want a stronger and more minty flavor.
Let cool in the back of the fridge to "steep" for at least an hour.
Pour into glasses and serve, with a fresh cucumber slice garnish.

name: Blackberry-Roses-Syrup
directions: Put all ingredients except the lemon peel and lemon acid in a pot and let simmer for about 10 minutes at 90 °C, stirring constantly. Then stir in the lemon peel and the lemon acid and let stand for about 30 minutes. Fill the syrup through a sieve into sterilized bottles and seal them immediately. Let the syrup cool and then store in the fridge.

name: Rose-Thyme-Syrup
directions: Bring the water, (gelling) sugar and dried rose petals to boil and let simmer for a few minutes on low heat, add the vanilla sugar and citric acid and stir repeatedly.

Then add the fresh thyme and let stand for about 25 minutes. Depending on the desired intensity, you can steep the thyme longer, but if you let it steep for too long, then the sirup could get too acerbic.
If the syrup is to sour for you, then add the rock sugar.

name: Coconut Milk Kefir
directions: I used canned coconut milk which resulted in a slightly coconut flavored kefir. I understand you can use the coconut milk that comes in the dairy case in 1/2 gallon containers and that kefir made from it does not have a coconut flavor - I have not tried this yet.
Be sure that you use a glass jar or plastic container and non-metal spatulas or spoons.
If you are using kefir grains that have been kept in milk, rinse them with non-chlorinated water to remove milk residue. You do not need to do this if you are not sensitive to lactose.
Shake the can of milk to combine the cream with the milk, then open and pour into the jar.
Add the kefir grains to the jar. Cover with a clean cloth or coffee filter or something similar, and leave on a counter away from direct sunlight or in a cupboard.
Coconut milk turns into kefir somewhat more quickly than does milk, 12 to 24 hours. In a heat wave, it was done in about 9 hours for me. The longer it stands, the tangier it gets.
Stir the kefir and then strain it in a nylon mesh or stainless steel strainer. A spatula is helpful to gently lift the curds and pick out the kefir grains. Don't press down on the grains.
Refrigerate the kefir for a day or so, where it will continue to thicken.
I used it to make delicious smoothies. If you prefer a yogurt type of consistency, drain through a coffee filter or in a yogurt strainer to make a thicker consistency.
Put the grains into a clean jar and start over. If you do not want to make more at this time, place in a container and cover by 1 inch with milk or cream  it should be ok for a week or so.

You can make coconut kefir for about two weeks, but after two weeks, rejuvenate the kefir grains in cow's or goat milk. Kefir grains will not grow and multiply in coconut milk, and they need the dairy milk to stay in peak condition.

name: Kiddie Cocktails
directions: Mix everything in a glass and serve over ice.

name: Creamy Carrot Juice
directions: For a nice cold drink I would advice using carrots that have been in the fridge for at least half an hour.
Juice one pound of large carrots.
Mix in one cup of vanilla almond milk. I prefer Almond Breeze's brand.
Add two teaspoons of sugar.
Add a pinch of nutmeg.
Mix and enjoy!

name: Pecan Milk (Milk Substitute)
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender or food processor. Store in clean jar in refrigerator for up to 3 days.

name: Walnut Milk (Milk Substitute)
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender or food processor. Store in clean jar in refrigerator for up to 3 days.

name: Old Country Martini
directions: Stir with cracked ice and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with an orange twist.

similar.name: Warm White Wine With Lime, Vanilla and Port

name: Tex-Mex Chico
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add the tequila, liqueur, simple syrup, and lemon juice; top off with club soda. Stir.

name: Cane Cutter Coffee
directions: In 8 oz coffee glass with handle, pour Brandy and Tea Maria. Pour in coffee to about 3 inches from the top. Add whipped cream. Garnish with cinnamon stick, add maraschino cherry. Serve hot.

name: Pocha (Tibetan Butter Tea)
directions: Combine the water and tea in a medium saucepan, bring to a boil, and then turn off the heat and let steep for 5 minutes. Use a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth to strain the liquid over a large bowl; discard the tea leaves.

Transfer the liquid back to the saucepan and bring to a boil, then decrease the heat to a simmer. Add the salt, sugar, butter, and half-and-half and whisk until the butter has completely dissolved and a little foam forms on the surface. Serve the tea in small bowls.

name: Arabic Coffee, the Saudi Way
directions: Put 3 cups of water in a pot and bring to a boil.
Add the coffee and boil over low flame. Turn the heat off after 5 minutes and leave the coffee to clear.
Pour the coffee into a kettle, leaving the coffee to settle in the pot.
Add in the cardamom and saffron to the kettle of coffee and boil once before serving in small cups.

similar.name: Charishma's Magical Kahlua Vanilla Creme Coffee

name: Cucumber Water Recipe
directions: In a pitcher, mix the water, cucumber, 3 mint sprigs and lemon. Let it rest on the fridge for 24 hours. If you prepare the water at the last minute, cut the first cucumber in three or four pieces. Then, squeeze the cucumber pieces to release all the juice.

Before serving remove the cucumber slices used to flavor the water. Then stir with a wooden spoon, add some ice cubes,  6 or 7 fresh cucumber slices and the remaining 2 mint sprigs. Enjoy this refreshing drink.

name: Sweet Orang Peel
directions: place salt, sugar and water in a small sauce pan.Stire well and let it sit while you peel the oranges and enjoying eating them.
wash the orange peel with cold water and cut them into long strips or any way you like it.
Use very hot water from your kitchen forcet soak the peel for 2 minutes and replet it 2-3 time to remove the bitter tast of the peel. The longer you soak it the peel will taste less better.
place the peel in the sugar water in the sauce pan.
place pan on low heat and let it cook for 5-7 minutes. Stire occasionally. When sugar starts thickening and peel become tranlucent. remove from heat and put in any  jar -- .

name: Pecan Pie Soda
directions: Mix everything but soda water in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
simmer about 40 minutes until reduced to 3/4 cup syrup.
strain and let cool.
stir 2 tablespoons syrup into 1 glass of soda water.

similar.name: Orange Ginger Tisane or Rum Toddy

name: Omani Breakfast Tea
directions: Put the water, sugar and tea into a teapot and bring to a boil over high heat. Boil for 2–3 minutes.
Add the canned milk, and if using ground cardamom, add that too. Bring again to a boil.
Then immediately remove from the heat (before it rises and comes out of the teapot).  If using ginger, add now then strain. Enjoy piping hot.

similar.name: Afghan Tea - an Authentic Family Recipe

name: Pillsbury Pear and Cranberry Cocktail
directions: In a pitcher, stir together cranberry juice, vodka, liqueur and lime juice. Put in fridge to cool for at least one hour.
When ready to serve, fill 4 glasses to brim with ice. Pour cocktail over ice. If too sweet, add additional lime juice.
Garnish each with pear slice and mint sprig.

name: Yuanyang (Hong Kong-Style Coffee With Sweetened Tea)
directions: Simmer tea and 1 cup water in a 2-qt. saucepan over medium heat for 3 minutes. Squeeze out and discard tea bags.
Stir in milk and bring to a boil.
Cook, stirring, for 3 minutes. Stir in coffee; pour into glasses.

name: Kopi Jahe (Indonesian Coffee With Ginger)
directions: Bring coffee, ginger, cinnamon and sugar to a boil in a 2-qt. saucepan with 6 cups water.
Reduce heat to medium; cook, stirring until sugar is dissolved.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake Cocktail
directions: Shake well and serve over ice.

name: Clara's Smoky Lavender Tea
directions: Place lavender buds and Lapsang Souchong loose leaf tea in a tea ball. If using loose leaf tea for the base, place in a second tea ball.
Place in a teapot and fill with boiling water.
Steep 5 minutes, then remove tea ball(s) and tea bag.
Serve with sugar and milk or cream.
Play with the amount of Lapsang Souchong to see what you like - some will like it more or less smoky!

name: Sweet Tea Swagger
directions: In a small saucepan bring 3 cups of the water to boiling. Remove from heat. Add tea bags; let steep for 10 minutes. Discard tea bags. Transfer tea to a heatproof pitcher.
Stir brown sugar into tea until dissolved. Stir in the remaining 3 cups water, the rum, and lime juice. Cover and chill for 2 to 48 hours.
To serve, pour tea mixture into highball glasses over ice cubes. Slowly pour in club soda; stir gently. Garnish with watermelon and lime wedges on toothpicks , and mint leaf or sprig.

name: Thai Iced Tea (ZWT-9)
directions: In a med saucepan over med-heat, bring the water to a boil. Stir in the Thai tea powder & remove from heat. Stir well to mix in the sugar & then let it cool (stirring occ to dissolve sugar).
When the tea has cooled to room temp, strain it thru a fine-mesh strainer or coffee filter into a pitcher & chill until serving time.

To serve, fill 4-6 tall glasses w/ice & then add about 3/4 cup Thai tea to ea glass. Top off ea glass w/3-4 tbsp evaporated milk. Serve at once, as the evaporated milk cascades over the ice & swirls languidly into the tea.

name: Caribbean Thunder
directions: Brew the coffee and chill if making iced coffee.
Divide ingredients (sugar through coconut cream) into each glass and mix well.
When mixed add the coffee (include ice if serving cold).
Garnish with whipped cream and a small pinch of allspice.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Carrot Top Jamaican Mon (Beverage With or Without Alcohol)

name: Simple Syrups
directions: FLAVOR DIRECTIONS:
1. In a small saucepan combine water and sugar. Bring to a boiling, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat. Cool to room temperature. Cover and chill at least 2 hours or up to 2 weeks.
Chamomile-Lavender Simple Syrup:

Prepare as above except stir 1/4 cup chamomille lavender herbal tea blend in with the sugar and water. After removing from the heat, let stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours. Strain after cooling.
Basil Simple Syrup:
Prepare as above except stir 1/4 cup snipped fresh basil in with the sugar and water. After removing from the heat, let stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours. Strain after cooling.
Mint Simple Syrup:
Prepare as above except stir 1/2 cup snipped fresh mint in with the sugar and water. After removing from the heat, let stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours. Strain after cooling.
Ginger Simple Syrup:
Prepare as above except stir 1/2 cup sliced fresh ginger in with the sugar and water. After removing from the heat, let stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours. Strain after cooling.

name: Harvest Spirits’ Seersucker Sling Labor Day Cocktail
directions: Combine:
2oz Harvest Spirits Core Apple Vodka.
2oz Tonic Water.
Garnish with thyme and alternating peeled apple slices and blueberries for striped, seersucker effect using a toothpick.
Serve over ice in chilled cocktail glass.

name: Italian Soda
directions: Put the grenadine in the glass.
add the sparkling water till the glass is about 3/4 full.
add a dollop of milk.
if you want an extra bit of fun, you can add  a little mountain of whipped cream.

name: Black Rat
directions: Mix all ingredients in a highball glass. Add ice.

name: Jamaica No Mistake Mon Coffee
directions: Brew fresh coffee with the allspice or nutmeg.
Pour rum and coffee liqueur into a decorative coffee glass and fill it with hot spiced coffee.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream and garnish with a coffee bean if you like.

name: Queensland Diesel
directions: In a highball, add rum, sarsaparilla or cola, twist of fresh lime. Add ice, stir, and enjoy!

name: Poinsettias
directions: 1. I prepare by first adding about 1/4 cup of cranberry juice then add the champagne and top with a few cranberries.
My Note:  Freeze the cranberries before adding them to your glass to keep the drink even colder! Enjoy!

I did 1/2 oz. triple sec, 3 oz. cranberry juice cocktail and filled remainder of glass with champagne and bought fresh cranberries and put in bottom of glasses. A great way to kick off a Holiday gathering!
I have top it of with a few frozen cranberries, and I small bundle of fresh mint for that real holiday look.

name: Dr. Oz 2 Week Rapid Weight Loss Diet Detox Broth Recipe:
directions: Add all the ingredients at once and place on a low boil for approximately 60 minutes. It may take a little longer. Simply continue to boil to taste.
Cool, strain (throw out the cooked vegetables), and store in a large, tightly-sealed glass container in the fridge.
Heat gently and drink up to 3 to 4 cups a day.

name: Planet Smoothie Chocolate Elvis
directions: Mix ingredients together in a blender until smooth.

name: Jordanian Herbal Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil.
While water comes to a boil add in chamomile, anise seed, thyme, and sage, stir well and turn off heat.
Cover pot and let steep for 3-5 minutes until liquid is golden brown.
Serve right away.

name: Carrot Top Jamaican Mon (Beverage With or Without Alcohol)
directions: In a blender, combine the carrot juice, condensed milk, nutmeg, vanilla, and rum, if desired.
Process until well blended.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to use.
Pour into 2 glasses with 1/2 cup each of crushed ice.  Garnish with cinnamon and serve.

name: Decadent Hot Chocolate
directions: put a pot/pan/whatever on low heat.
pour in sugar and allow to caramelise.
as this is happening, add milk little by little to the areas where the sugar is almost brown.
keep doing this until all the sugar is covered, no stirring yet.
turn the heat up and grab a whisk.
whisk the mixture as it bubbles up for 30 seconds.
turn the heat down, add more milk, add the cocoa at once.
turn the heat up and whisk until cocoa is well blended inches.
add the maple syrup and whisk.
add milk again and turn down the heat.
serve this in a mug topped with whipped cream/ marshmallows or whatever you please.
enjoy :D.

name: Purple Cow
directions: Combine all ingredients into blender container. Cover and blend until smooth.
Serve in a tall glass with a straw. Garnish with whipped topping if desired.

name: Beergaritas Mexicanos
directions: Use the lime slices to rub down the rims of the glasses and dip in salt, if you want to. Otherwise dip a slice of lime in salt and place at bottom of each glass.
Combine the beer, limeade concentrate and tequila and serve in glasses over ice.

name: Soda Gembira (Happy Soda)
directions: Combine syrup and condensed milk in a glass. Pour soda over mixture and then add ice.
Stir and serve.

name: Instant Spiced Beverage Mix
directions: MEASURE all ingredients into a medium resealable container: 1 cup granulated sugar, 6 tablespoons French vanilla flavored instant coffee creamer, 2 tablespoons Butter Buds, 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon, 2 teaspoons ground nutmeg, 1 teaspoon ground ginger, 1/2 teaspoon ground allspice, 1/4 teaspoon ground cloves; SEAL container; SHAKE well until thoroughly combined.

TO MAKE A SINGLE-SERVING HOT BEVERAGE: Stir 2 level tablespoons beverage mix into a mug with 6 ounces hot water. Add 2 ounces cream. Stir and microwave to reheat if necessary. Top with whipped cream and garnish with a dusting of cinnamon or nutmeg. Serve and enjoy.
TO MAKE A SINGLE-SERVING EGG-FREE NOG: Stir 2 level tablespoons beverage mix into a mug with 8 ounces cream or half and half. Stir and microwave to heat, if desired. Serve and enjoy.

TO MAKE A SINGLE-SERVING EGG-FREE TOM & JERRY: Stir 2 level tablespoons beverage mix into a mug with 6 ounces hot water. Add 1 ounce cream. Add 1 fluid ounce brandy and 1/2 fluid ounce rum. Stir and microwave to heat. Serve and enjoy.
TO FLAVOR COFFEE OR TEA: Add desired amount to hot coffee or tea. Stir. Serve and enjoy.

TO FLAVOR HOMEMADE ICE CREAM: Add desired amount to sugarless cream batch for ice cream. Mix thoroughly. Add sugar to desired sweetness. Pour into ice cream maker. Prepare ice cream as usual. Serve and enjoy.

similar.name: Twelve Treats of Christmas Eggnog Martini

name: Starbuck's Style Cake Batter Frappuccino
directions: Add to a blender all liquids first. Add sugar, syrup, ice cream and crushed ice, in that order.
Blend until smooth.

similar.name: Coffee-Mate Style Homemade Liquid Coffee Creamer

name: Jack-O-Lantern Cocktail
directions: Combine liquor, juice, soda and ice in a cocktail shaker. Shake well and strain into a martini glass that has been filled with 1/4 cup tapioca pearls.
Fold a small piece of lime twist/peel in half and insert it into the center of an orange wheel. Garnish with this "Pumpkin Top.".

name: Coffee-Mate Style Homemade Liquid Coffee Creamer
directions: Pour into a large jar and shake until combined. Add any of the following flavor combinations to the base mix.
French Vanilla Creamer - 2 teaspoons vanilla extract or vanilla coffee syrup.
Vanilla Bean Coffee Creamer - 2 teaspoons vanilla bean paste.
Chocolate - 2-3 tablespoons chocolate syrup, (1 tsp vanilla extract, optional).
Toasted Almond - 2 teaspoons almond extract.
Coconut - 2 teaspoons coconut extract.
Hazelnut - 2 teaspoons hazelnut extract.
Chocolate Almond - 1 tablespoon cocoa powder, 1 teaspoon almond extract.
Strudel - 1 tablespoon cinnamon, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon almond extract.
Vanilla Caramel - 2 tablespoons caramel ice cream topping, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
Chocolate Raspberry - 2 teaspoons cocoa powder, 2 tablespoons raspberry syrup.
Irish Cream - 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup, 1 teaspoon instant coffee (Nescafe), 1-2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon almond extract.

Samoa (like the Girl Scout Cookies) - 2 teaspoons coconut extract, 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup, 2 tablespoons caramel ice cream topping (you can also sub coconut milk or cream of coconut for the regular milk in the base mixture if you don't have coconut extract).
Peppermint Patty - 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup, 1 teaspoon peppermint extract.
Cinnamon Vanilla - 2 teaspoons cinnamon, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
Pumpkin Spice - 3 tablespoons pureed pumpkin, 1 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice, 4 tablespoons maple syrup, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
Honey Vanilla - 1/4 cup honey, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
Almond Joy - 1-2 teaspoons coconut extract (see Samoa), 1 teaspoon almond extract, 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup.
Sweet Cream - Use 1 3/4 cups of heavy cream instead of the milk in the base recipe, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract or the inside of a vanilla bean, scraped, 1 teaspoon almond extract.
Chocolate Orange - 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup, 1-2 teaspoons orange extract.
Chocolate Hazelnut - 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup, 2 teaspoons hazelnut extract.
Cinnamon Cake - 2 teaspoons cinnamon, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
Salted Caramel - 2-3 tablespoons caramel ice cream topping, 1/2 teaspoon salt.
Eggnog - replace milk in base recipe with equal amount of heavy cream, 1 teaspoons vanilla extract, 2 teaspoons rum extract, 1 teaspoon ground nutmeg.

similar.name: Mc Donald's Vanilla Iced Coffee (Copycat Recipe)
Iced Coconut Milk Cafe, Low Fat

name: How to Make the Best Tapioca Boba in 7 Easy Steps
directions: Measure the amount of tapioca that you'd like to cook. In a separate pot, measure six times the amount of water (ex: 1 cup tapioca = 6 cups water). Please make sure you have enough water or else the boba is likely to stick and burn.
Bring the pot of water to a boil.
Once boiling, put the tapioca in and stir lightly so nothing sticks to the bottom. Similar to cooking pasta .
Boil on High with the lid closed for 23-28 minutes (cooking time vary depending on your stove power). If the pot overflows then you will need a bigger pot.
Once time is up, remove the pot from the stove with the lid still closed. Let the pot sit for 20-25 minutes.
Drain the excess liquid and wash the tapioca in slightly warm water. Drain again.
Put it in a serving pot and you're done!

name: Bourbon Slush
directions: Prepare strong tea by steeping all 4 tea bags in 2 cups of water. Squeeze excess water out of the tea bags.
Mix the sugar, frozen lemonade, and strong tea in a large bowl.
Add the orange juice, the remaining 7 cups of water, and the bourbon and mix again.
Freeze the mixture in a freeze-safe container for at least 24 hours, or as long as needed to get a consistent, slushy texture.
Scoop out the slush and serve with a little Seven-Up or Sprite to taste.

name: Sweet N Sour Mix
directions: Start with a cup of granulated sugar.
Add water and simmer over medium heat until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Next, add half a cup each of fresh lemon and lime juice. You’ll need about seven plump lemons and limes.
Your Sweet and Sour Mix is now ready! You can store it in a sealed container in the fridge for about a week, or even longer in the freezer.
his recipe makes enough for about 2 pitchers of margaritas, using 1 1/4 cup for each pitcher.
HINT: Some drinks you might make with this recipe, Margarita, Strawberry Margaritas, Amaretto Sour, Long Island Iced Tea.  Or you might use it to make an Old Fashioned!
